name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Nancy Pelosi: "I will make sure [President Trump] does not intimidate the whistleblower"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Nancy Pelosi, in an interview with _Face the Nation_ , made it clear that she is taking Trump's intimidation of the whistleblower, Amb. Marie Yovanovitch, and other witnesses very seriously. She also said, "I think part of it is his own insecurity as an impostor." We couldn't have said it better. But with Trump claiming he knows the identity of the whistleblower, lashing out on Twitter at anyone who dares criticize him, and in full-on attack mode against the House Leader, we need to hear what Democratic voters think: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcfa/6e9863e8/16aae209/1db0a496/582035466/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/zhlIRNsd") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcfa/6e9863e8/16aae209/1db0a496/582035466/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/zhlIRNsd") Thank you so much for your input \-- with the rapidly changing political landscape, hearing from engaged voters is incredibly important as we plan our strategy to take back the Senate and the White House in 2020. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcfa/6e9863e8/16aae209/1db0a495/582035466/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191125d.ND-b&refcode2=v0sG3bIK8Q9qmH0Y93rn")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

Washington, DC 20003

body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDExOTUwNTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MjMzMTQxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Having issues receiving Mike’s messages?

As you can probably imagine, Mike’s email inbox is VERY full on a daily basis. And we know yours is too.

Peter,

As you can probably imagine, Mike’s email inbox is VERY full on a daily basis.

And we know yours is too. That’s why we want to make sure you’re not having any problems receiving Mike’s messages for you that he sends your way.

Here’s an easy solution to this frequent issue:

To make sure Mike can reach you with breaking updates from the campaign trail, follow the simple steps below to ensure you are always receiving all things important regarding the Miami Valley and Southwest Ohio.

Open our latest Team Turner email update. (Note: It might be in your spam folder.)
Click the 3 Dotted Button next to the Reply Button.
Click “Add Team Turner to Contacts List”

This will ensure that you’ll find Team Turner emails at the top of your inbox!

Thank you,

Team Turner

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: Only need 750 more donors from Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: I'm in the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kinzinger for Congress
body:
| [ ](www.electadam.com)
---
Friend, Today, I filed my candidacy papers with the Illinois State Board of Elections to officially run for re-election. With over 4,000 signatures -- more than three times the number required by law -- I'm honored to have the support of my friends and neighbors, and grateful to each and every person who signed their name in support of my fight for Common-Sense Conservatism and Servant Leadership in Washington. I just launched my first campaign video, and would love to hear what you think: [](https://www.electadam.com/2020?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_for_re_election&n=1) I'm energized by the strong support and humbled to have the confidence of so many friends here in the 16th Congressional District who, like me, are working hard to keep America great for future generations. Thank you to those who volunteered their time to collect these signatures with me and my team, and thank you to all those across our communities who continue to support me as your Representative in the People's House. We have plenty of work ahead of us, and I'm ready to keep up the fight! You can join us by chipping in what you can to flip the House, and return us to a United Majority. Consider a donation of $20.20 to keep us on the path to victory! [$20.20 TO WIN IN 2020](https://www.electadam.com/support?e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_for_re_election&n=2) Thanks as always for your support. With good people like you behind me, we can't lose! Adam
| [ ](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6vqT3OpPWah76AO06wwwFqJ-xxr4keELV2d4JdHAmLhp&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_for_re_election&n=3) [ ](https://www.future1st.us/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNCDBgQphekXkJc2K3uZrHWcCkDncOztAEg2HCUvnwt8g&e=6d68a9acc7ac3c9a641bdf5d2966b0b3&utm_source=electadam&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=filing_for_re_election&n=4)
---

Kinzinger for Congress · PO Box 2365, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States

name: Booker HQ
subject: Why hasn't Cory been polling higher?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I don't know about you, but everyone I've talked to recently has asked me the same thing -- why hasn't Cory been polling higher?
| | |
---
| Hey there, Emily here, Cory's Chief Innovation Officer. It's my job to make sure our campaign is being as innovative as possible with our resources. Right now, our team is focusing on making sure Cory qualifies for the December debate. A few days ago we hit the donor threshold, now we need to get the polls. **[Will you chip in to help us do it?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191125_BHQ_20191125-fr-BHQ-polling-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I don't know about you, but everyone I've talked to recently has asked me the same thing -- _why hasn 't Cory been polling higher?_ I mean, he crushed it on the debate stage last week, we have strong teams on the ground in the early states, and his favorability ratings are consistently some of the highest in the field. So why aren't the polls reflecting that? **Here 's the thing -- Cory is in a lot of folks' top two picks for president. People like Cory, but just like many voters around the country, they just aren't quite ready to commit themselves fully to any candidate yet.** But not to worry, we have a plan to start threading the needle. We know that **the more people hear about Cory, the more they like him** \-- _which is especially important to note when a recent poll found that even though only around 6% of folks say they 're undecided, 53% of likely Democratic voters who currently have a preferred candidate may change their mind about whom they support._ We're coordinating efforts, based on these findings, to get the polls we need for Cory to qualify for the December debate. We're planning more trips across the country, placing ad buys, and hiring additional staff in key early states to reach these undecided and persuadable folks. Our team is making sure they know who Cory is, what he stands for, and why he is the candidate who can -- and will -- defeat Donald Trump. **[It's time to make moves, team. Will you help us do it by donating today? Anything you can give will help us show these persuadable folks why Cory is the best candidate for president.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191125_BHQ_20191125-fr-BHQ-polling-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for all your help,
Emily Emily Norman
Chief Innovation Officer
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191125_BHQ_20191125-fr-BHQ-polling-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0de3/5fca0d19/79762559/291c52a9/2274978483/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0de3/5fca0d19/79762559/291c52a8/2274978483/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0de3/5fca0d19/79762559/291c52b7/2274978483/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0de3/5fca0d19/79762559/291c52b6/2274978483/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

body:

| [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e5c3f6cf7f00488eadb4d2549a2fe07e&_e=D2N3KuebDWfcx-MxE2eibPADum4zs-c1SD4O8hb98y3TfIKoW55zCm_2nPTTTikKDAXIf17g1jaQku_epkdwp8jfGEckN9eZAbMFEr-eik2qckmFEzVHUVD3bfjFaCQ-xEa8rjJfys5kOwGCOoR95xiuq8GGvbD3yBQgqvik1Ru2WbmfiScQVFcUCKLS3XLtZOJmmgXounjAjaVexPrRFeUx3DpDHiGkceUY0a0D6Uey_5jqc1oEpJufmQcQviuEG15cM0h-aMDCfYXQ1e1iRJXnZclNBFeMxRjkdlFIIjaeDjg_vqnZgX_wdO4PdKJyvgek0yzZniKfMAPse26DoE3NgYRJDKU5IbeyXZuW75LCPeitA0cLiLG02-esQRMP)
---
Friend,

**[In less than one week I will be facing a major November fundraising deadline and it comes at a critical time for our president and our country.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e5c3f6cf7f00488eadb4d2549a2fe07e&_e=D2N3KuebDWfcx-MxE2eibPADum4zs-c1SD4O8hb98y3TfIKoW55zCm_2nPTTTikKDAXIf17g1jaQku_epkdwp8jfGEckN9eZAbMFEr-eik2qckmFEzVHUVD3bfjFaCQ-xEa8rjJfys5kOwGCOoR95xiuq8GGvbD3yBQgqvik1Ru2R8pRAWQ7dTCyDU_IBSjufyN1NwhyMFN-UMkwWLoUHtDqpewuMF2fxnMEzhYJa00AJk2mzarlC4MWgR-wDPp8PIGXObklgYbg78-wJ0tUHGk9P_hUPR7qzRzO_StJNtTePR1D_CDo8IUxUNG5cLSVbriurv5I-1SGE_D4_Z0g8x4wtkM1EeY6camPRaKNjAUaGrP6dMXRowz7UGiJdj4Z)**

House Democrats finished their public hearings last week in their SCAM impeachment inquiry against President Trump and the whispers in D.C. are... **Adam Schiff is feverishly writing a “findings report” that will serve as the Radical Left’s blue print for his impeachment**.

This cannot go on any longer. **[Friend, I need you to join my campaign and help me defend the President TODAY, before this WITCH HUNT goes to a vote.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e5c3f6cf7f00488eadb4d2549a2fe07e&_e=D2N3KuebDWfcx-MxE2eibPADum4zs-c1SD4O8hb98y3TfIKoW55zCm_2nPTTTikKDAXIf17g1jaQku_epkdwp8jfGEckN9eZAbMFEr-eik2qckmFEzVHUVD3bfjFaCQ-xEa8rjJfys5kOwGCOoR95xiuq8GGvbD3yBQgqvik1RvgvTGh94gN3X-RIfvWc1w2t4MLqNK1eWl_EinLBGzhmZt8ZA4MQ-998Qq75UP6AX3RHtbUytB6OyOW4Y7Hl1dqsm4cEuP6-sPZUFO3j4m4KudS2R061utZEr1WmRGF_tDsFhHYqe1y0iXmvagXu0Psv7fG0vMHwuJDnRWq1rQoqYAeoCNhpXaNECh490g7N5jrZYMipH505spdOfT6Z0hR)**

[**STAND WITH TRUMP »**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=e5c3f6cf7f00488eadb4d2549a2fe07e&_e=D2N3KuebDWfcx-MxE2eibPADum4zs-c1SD4O8hb98y3TfIKoW55zCm_2nPTTTikKDAXIf17g1jaQku_epkdwp8jfGEckN9eZAbMFEr-eik2qckmFEzVHUVD3bfjFaCQ-xEa8rjJfys5kOwGCOoR95xiuq8GGvbD3yBQgqvik1RvjyG1gcGGRb0nK4V7Aeq3WM8FMHV7mItKwMLs69ILKHfVoJ64Q25e2fKO0DCgZP8c3WfytItrh9tHkDBoP98HwLXE0oRI2aGJAtYlPQq0SnxqTRN_fWFAAAbj6OY9KxJDbU4_-FNNu7NOTmhyAr8ws6V0EQ99YnGIeMsAkV0Ox0aSakbIzSFz7_BeQhgeOdX6vfRHbMYXy5Qv-hR4OenZg)

Friend, Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi’s SCAM impeachment inquiry is an ongoing threat to our Democracy.

They’ve both known from the start **there isn’t one ounce of evidence against our duly-elected president** - yet they’ve wasted _millions_ of taxpayer dollars trying to convince the American public otherwise.

As the president’s number one defender in Washington, it’s critical I have the resources we need to make sure if this comes down to a Senate vote - it’s crushed immediately.

Friend, I’m running out of time and still need to raise $15,000 in the next 5 days. name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 11/25
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday! Last week was a busy week for the campaign! I have been criss-crossing the state this week and firing on all cylinders. I went to Rutherford County, Cumberland County, Knox County, Madison County, Sevier County and then finished the week in Marion County talking and meeting with supporters. I love going to each Grand Division, meeting folks and talking about the different issues across Tennessee. With this week being Thanksgiving, I am looking forward to spending time with my family. Life is like a candle; it can go out in an instant. Take the time this week to be thankful for your loved ones and spend time with them! **Media: ** Our social media post of the week comes from my speech to the County Officials Association of Tennessee in Gatlinburg last Wednesday. I am extremely grateful for the opportunity to speak to so many elected officials about growing up in rural Tennessee and my plans to impact healthcare and immigration as your next U.S. Senator. I also spoke about bringing power back to local officials to solve problems such as the opioid crisis. Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkytuky-uunkhiuw-y/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkytuky-uunkhiuw-j/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkytuky-uunkhiuw-t/)! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our Check-Up with Dr. Manny. Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, [DrMannyforSenate.com.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkytuky-uunkhiuw-i/) As I ponder what I'm grateful for this Thanksgiving, I think about my wife, my kids, a great life that my parents gave to me when they came to America, and the opportunity to live the American Dream. And I'm extremely thankful for you. The support you have shown my family and me is something I'm grateful for every day and I greatly appreciate it. Hope you and your family have a fun, relaxing Thanksgiving! Dr. Manny P.S. We don't have the machine backing us, but we do have you. Would you mind chipping in to our campaign right now to send this conservative outsider to Washington? [Donate](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jdkytuky-uunkhiuw-d/) |
| |

clean_body: | | ---|---|--- | Happy Monday! Last week was a busy week for the campaign! I have been criss-crossing the state this week and firing on all cylinders. I went to Rutherford County, Cumberland County, Knox County, Madison County, Sevier County and then finished the week in Marion County talking and meeting with supporters. I love going to each Grand Division, meeting folks and talking about the different issues across Tennessee. With this week being Thanksgiving, I am looking forward to spending time with my family. Life is like a candle; it can go out in an instant. Take the time this week to be thankful for your loved ones and spend time with them! Media: Our social media post of the week comes from my speech to the County Officials Association of Tennessee in Gatlinburg last Wednesday. I am extremely grateful for the opportunity to speak to so many elected officials about growing up in rural Tennessee and my plans to impact healthcare and immigration as your next U.S. Senator. I also spoke about bringing power back to local officials to solve problems such as the opioid crisis. Follow us on , , and ! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our Check-Up with Dr. Manny. Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, As I ponder what I'm grateful for this Thanksgiving, I think about my wife, my kids, a great life that my parents gave to me when they came to America, and the opportunity to live the American Dream. And I'm extremely thankful for you. The support you have shown my family and me is something I'm grateful for every day and I greatly appreciate it. Hope you and your family have a fun, relaxing Thanksgiving! Dr. Manny P.S. We don't have the machine backing us, but we do have you. Would you mind chipping in to our campaign right now to send this conservative outsider to Washington? | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Dr Manny for U.S. Senate | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

body:
| Listen, there's no doubt about it: Minnesota is going to be ground zero in 2020. The Trump campaign is going to do everything they can to try to flip us red. The only question is: Are we up for the fight? We know the answer is a resounding "you betcha!" But we need to stay prepared, and that means keeping our budget on track. Listen, there's no doubt about it: Minnesota is going to be ground zero in 2020.
The Trump campaign is going to do everything they can to try to flip us red. The only question is: Are we up for the fight?
We know the answer is a resounding _" you betcha!"_ But we need to stay prepared, and that means keeping our budget on track.
**Our end-of-month deadline is coming up on Saturday and we 're $4,723 short of our goal. name: Thank President Trump (CDP)
subject: Your Thanksgiving note to Pres. Trump?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO DEFEND THE
body:
CDP

Peter:
It's almost Thanksgiving, and our President needs to know we're
thankful for his willingness to fight for us. Will you send a
thank you note to Pres. Trump for fighting #fakenews + the Dems
SHAM impeachment?

🍗 🥧 🇺🇸
We need have 10,000 Thanksgiving notes by tomorrow.
Tap the button to start:

Compose & Send ✉

Peter,

If there's one thing President Trump needs more than anything
else right now - it's our thanks and encouragement.

Certainly, he deserves our most heartfelt gratitude for
jumpstarting this economy, taking on the #fakenews, and refusing
to bend under the Democrats' threats of impeachment.

While liberals are all rooting for him to fail - lets tell our
President that we're counting on him to succeed!

Join me and the Committee to Defend the President in thanking our
President. Click/Tap to begin composing your personal note of
thanks and we'll take care of delivering it to the White House
for you!

Compose & Send ✉

Thank you and God Bless,

- Ted

Chairman, Committee to Defend the President

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: 4X Iron Bow MATCH! Check this out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
🏈 If Alabama & Auburn put up 60 points or more, I’ll QUADRUPLE MATCH your support! Read more >>
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | Peter,

The 2019 Iron Bowl is coming up fast next Saturday. You know the fiercest rivalry in all of sports is sure to not disappoint!

I can't wait for the big game. And because it coincides with our end-of-month fundraising deadline, I'm putting a special opportunity on the line.

If Alabama and Auburn put up a combined 60 points or more,**I'm going to personally QUADRUPLE MATCH online contributions** to my campaign this week, up to $10,000!

That's right. If you chip in $10, I'll match $40. If you give $25, I'll match $100... and so on.

**[Tap or click here to make a special Iron Bowl contribution today!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=f755d2ec78662ba07e3d1c2074cda0b2aaa77935e6841c564b59498b1f1870656b2fcbdfcf6b2be49433f4af8185625701a55e2913eee315 "Tap or click here to make a special Iron Bowl contribution today!")**

This is an opportunity to make a HUGE impact as we gear up for December. I think the boys will do it!

So please, **[make a secure online donation today](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=f755d2ec78662ba025c68c7fe0f92d6395f6820d06d3951179a6e63e6c87a6bbd1166a6c20c65f5378ce1fa848536405335f27dddfdb8004 "make a secure online donation today")**. We'll add your contribution to the list... and when the Tide and Tigers combine for 60 points or more, I'll quadruple match it!

You know the fiercest rivalry in all of sports is sure to not disappoint! I can't wait for the big game. If Alabama and Auburn put up a combined 60 points or more,I'm going to personally QUADRUPLE MATCH online contributions to my campaign this week, up to $10,000! That's right. If you chip in $10, I'll match $40. If you give $25, I'll match $100... and so on. "Tap or click here to make a special Iron Bowl contribution today!" This is an opportunity to make a HUGE impact as we gear up for December. I think the boys will do it! So please, "make a secure online donation today". We'll add your contribution to the list... and when the Tide and Tigers combine for 60 points or more, I'll quadruple match it! \- Coach "Donate $5 - $25 Impact with Match!" name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Leading on principle and policy: some recent op-eds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
**My campaign is based on principle, backed by policy. **Not only have I spoken of these “two P’s” at public events and in the media but I have also written op-eds on them.** I have been honored to have the opportunity to express how we can unite our nation and convene the world toward our collective good on the Presidential campaign trail, and below are a few opinion articles I’ve published while doing so,** from geopolitical issues and accountable leadership to climate change and labor force training and re-training. You can read a few below:
* "To fully understand why our policies are failing to meet **the Chinese challenge** , it is important to realize the complete context of what China is presently doing, both around the world and at home: laying the foundation for their global dominance for the foreseeable future." My thoughts on China in the Harvard International Review [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248439/125782001/-567290602?emci=3a02ba7c-da0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=).

* "Want a skilled workforce and an education policy that looks after all Americans? Don’t forgive all student debt: focus on **'Training for a Lifetime'** for the 65% of Americans who don’t have a college degree." \-- my op-ed in the Nashua Telegraph [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248440/125782002/-1423851184?emci=3a02ba7c-da0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=).

* "Fighting **climate change** is vital to our national security, but we need to convene the world to do it." -- my op-ed on climate change in the Washington Examiner [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248441/125782003/179838860?emci=3a02ba7c-da0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=).

* "Why America needs an accountable President again." -- my op-ed on **accountable leadership** in Fortune [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248442/125782004/2048012389?emci=3a02ba7c-da0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=).

* "We need to get ‘The People’s Bureau’ back into fighting shape." -- my piece on** the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau **in the Allentown Morning Call [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248443/125782005/-1979823412?emci=3a02ba7c-da0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=).

* "As we deal with the rise of China on the world stage, along with other autocratic regimes like Russia and non-state actors like ISIS, we must invest in controlling **transformative warfare** as we have done in the past." -- my piece on defense reform in the Newark Star-Ledger [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248444/125782006/890451294?emci=3a02ba7c-da0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=).

* "I believe we need to be accountable to **Native American citizens** of these United States – not only for the debt we owe them for their service today, but for the injustices throughout our nation’s history that we are still struggling to mend." -- my op-ed on Native Americans in Indian Country Today [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248445/125782007/1624152011?emci=770ef503-d10c-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=e0c10803-3d0d-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=101999&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=).

* "Having served in the military, I know that militaries can stop a problem, but they can’t fix a problem. This is why I supported the **Iran nuclear accord** , and still support it today as the best framework for maintaining peace and security for us and our allies." \-- my op-ed on Iran in the Des Moines Register [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248446/125782008/654585162?emci=3a02ba7c-da0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=).

* "My Presidential Campaign In One Word? **Accountability**." -- my opinion piece on accountable leadership in the Daily Caller [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248447/125782009/-129421042?emci=3a02ba7c-da0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=).

* And look out for "A win-win-win for **rural America** " -- my piece on how to help rural communities, coming out in the Des Moines Register on December 4th.

Now, we must have a leader who is accountable to people and therefore can unite our country so we can advance our policies without executive orders that a follow-on President will just “rip out.”
Warmest regards and Happy Thanksgiving, Joe

Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12248448/125782010/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTEwODZlYi02YTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rGDjMpzYt9p9ugKmTWukyAGDlN-FxxqsNyNdYMqJznc=&emci=3a02ba7c-da0f-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=5a1086eb-6a10-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798) and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.
Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

It’s hard to believe, but we’re now just weeks away from 2020 and we’re JUST DAYS away from closing out November.

_And we need YOUR HELP to close the gap, Peter!_

**[Will you rush a $10, $25, $50, or $100 special contribution to help us reach our goal?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8c998f2cd5e5596c/533f3b49e5f49729c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

DONATE HERE>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8c998f2cd5e5596c/2bb8098b10e886f0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** We can’t afford to blow this opportunity, Peter. The Democrats have gone off the deep end... from their embrace of this impeachment fraud to their push for a socialist and anti-American agenda.

**[We must take a stand for our conservative values and a stronger America](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/8c998f2cd5e5596c/25182c117a03a702c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** , and that’s EXACTLY why Corky is running for this seat!

Thank you for ALL your support in this key 2020 U.S. Senate race!

| Team,

Four days left for the beautiful Montana Silversmith belt buckle challenge! Every $10 donation to the campaign earns a raffle ticket for the buckle! My fight is for rural Montana, farmers & ranchers, the working class (unions, techs, wage earners, educators, police, firefighters, etc.). If you measure wealth in family and work accomplished, my fight is to ensure your lives feel more bountiful every year we sit down to the holiday table. My hat is off to every hard working Montanan and I wish all the best during the holidays! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12252089/125809365/1776779849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTYwODZiYS03NTEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hx1QcRNzBRz5x9CFjaj9ZCVZ06EZsxsbmTloSTEmgy4=&emci=b773fe92-6f10-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=156086ba-7510-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8326059) I know the holidays are a time of financial crunch for the Montanans I'm in this race to represent and fight for. Matt Rains is a Democrat running for Congress to be a strong, independent voice for Montana. Matt is a 5th generation Montana rancher, a West Point graduate, and a Blackhawk helicopter pilot who served in Iraq. Matt will bring his Montana cowboy qualities to Washington to fight for affordable health care, better education, and to protect our public lands.

Matt is running to represent hardworking Montanans, not DC lobbyists and wealthy corporations. That means he's relying on your grassroots support. name: Team Salango
subject: FW: Did you see Ben's email yesterday?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/78839/images/Salango%20Logo%20PMS%20Reversed%20Op%201.png]
Friend,
Did you see Ben's email yesterday? We are so close to hitting our monthly goal and we need you to chip in. Can you help us hit our goal before Thanksgiving?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/11252 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/11252]
Onward,
Team Salango
--- Original Message ---
>From : Ben Salango for Governor
Sent: Monday, November 25 2019, 6:00 p.m.
Friend,
Over the last few weeks, so many of you have joined our campaign and I am so humbled to have you in my corner.
With November coming to an end, I wanted to give you an update. We are 75 individual contributions away from our monthly goal. We need your help to get there.
The next few weeks are critical for us to stay on track.
If we can continue to keep up this progress, we are going to continue the same trend that we saw in Kentucky and then Louisiana: Electing more and more Democrats in deeply red states. That is why I have to ask you directly.
Can I count on you to contribute to our campaign before Thanksgiving? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/11252]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/11252 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/11252]
If we hit our goal of 75 new donors, we are one step closer to beating Jim Justice.
That is why your contribution is so significant.
Sincerely,
Ben Salango
P.S. Click here to be one of our 75 new donors. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/11252]

Ben Salango for West Virginia
PO Box 11650
Charleston, WV 25339
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/059a4f37-5c10-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/d9909fb1-7610-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTkwOWZiMS03NjEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xaI3LEdINKHDD9yzx-lrrf9PLhL2hAK9VbKEvLsAuyA=&id=101419885&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

**We'll get right to it: We want to hit our November fundraising goal before the end of the week.**

Elizabeth has been traveling across the country -- from Nevada to Georgia -- taking questions at public town halls, hosting organizing meetings, and talking with people about the really big ideas our campaign is fighting for.

But it's not just about Elizabeth's schedule. It's going to take a huge grassroots movement to get Washington working for the people again. That's why we're putting even more organizers on the ground and building tools for amazing supporters to mobilize their own communities. But it takes real resources to get those things done.

**So here's the ask: We've only got the rest of the week to hit our November fundraising goal and we need your help to get it done.**

**[Can you chip in $2 to own a piece of our movement and help our campaign hit this important fundraising goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b413/45c30650/119bf5a48/66f69b13/2162199635/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFYRl9FT01fR09MX0NfMjAxOTExMjZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1XF_EOM_GOL_C_20191126_V1S2_P")**

>
There's incredible momentum out there for Elizabeth and her bold plans like canceling student loan debt, guaranteeing Universal Child Care, and making sure billionaires and giant corporations pay their fair share in taxes.

**But we need to keep building our organization in Pennsylvania and across the country to make sure they become a reality.**

And we're only growing our movement with grassroots donors like you -- no Super PACs, no fancy-schmancy fundraisers just for wealthy donors, and no money from PACs or federal lobbyists.

Elizabeth has been traveling across the country -- from Nevada to Georgia -- taking questions at public town halls, hosting organizing meetings, and talking with people about the really big ideas our campaign is fighting for. But it's not just about Elizabeth's schedule. It's going to take a huge grassroots movement to get Washington working for the people again. That's why we're putting even more organizers on the ground and building tools for amazing supporters to mobilize their own communities. But it takes real resources to get those things done. name: Team Scholten
subject: What we’re hearing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

The headlines in the news aren’t telling the full story. On one hand, Wall Street is reaching record high profits, turning more and more millionaires into billionaires.

On the other hand, more family farms are going bankrupt. Loan delinquencies are sky-rocketing. Farmer suicides are on the rise.

Our rural communities are suffering; the very people who grow our food, power our country, and clothe our kids are bearing the brunt of our trade wars, a half-decade of low-commodity prices, and abuses to the Renewable Fuel Standard.

Politicians seem to have forgotten about us. We are not given a seat at the table, and decisions are made without us in mind. People are fed up.

The person who is meant to represent our interests, Steve King, is not allowed on any committee in the House, rendering his position useless and leaving Iowa’s 4th district without a voice in Washington.

**That is not right.**

**[Contribute today to J.D.’s campaign. Pitching in $5 or more will give us a chance to have real representation, electing someone who will stand tall for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12253010/125816792/315283610?refcode=em19_191126_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZkZjJjMy03ODEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRqM2sqU3qyH9z9SuRsV_rLBRASkHG3YPmA-Fgo1jn8=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12253011/125816793/315283610?refcode=em19_191126_eom1&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZkZjJjMy03ODEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRqM2sqU3qyH9z9SuRsV_rLBRASkHG3YPmA-Fgo1jn8=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12253012/125816794/315283610?refcode=em19_191126_eom1&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZkZjJjMy03ODEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRqM2sqU3qyH9z9SuRsV_rLBRASkHG3YPmA-Fgo1jn8=)

J.D. is not going to back down from this fight. He’s fighting for us, our community, and our future.

That’s why he’s on the Don’t Forget About Us Tour -- he’s reaching out to people in the overlooked communities so they know they are heard.

We need you to pitch in now to make sure we can keep traveling across the district, talking with people about the issues that matter and the values we share. Our November deadline is coming up soon and we need your help to succeed.

**[Contribute $5 or more today to our grassroots campaign to beat Steve King. We deserve better, and that’s why we need to elect J.D.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12253017/125816799/315283610?refcode=em19_191126_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZkZjJjMy03ODEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRqM2sqU3qyH9z9SuRsV_rLBRASkHG3YPmA-Fgo1jn8=)**

subject: Racism is alive and well in the United States

body:
ALERT: if you're sensitive to foul language, don't open this emailALERT: if you're sensitive to foul language, don't open this email. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=28e0642e25fc4b719fa903df1b356834&_t=D0c5Dybirp8J_eEZlmaSkUHdax7Lm7I35nvgoIuKfcnEkbgj9q7T3e05AvEOtIHcP6WRcrT44tjETPVxaXbJCjjLtl5_4Iz5I2CZ4SR9k4i7KabUqzk3NToO8l00Z4k31XwknvejICQqivu77-lo-gXGsBoHWRsJY40qoCDcebU%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=28e0642e25fc4b719fa903df1b356834&_e=93rpokYiy2EVVWbXl-jz460utButGZ-B_GDOtpRu2G_BwsH6aZqtSIJLbevgH0INS-fiz-Xpu2-6V52ncaX0NVjvDMywWe_CyQSh1ZeOi-ENOlhJ0LBEeXnOUzrqJFWJu_aMdXoGcvigVHbPt0SNrOE1gyYceazM22RpD2UcwLhBcteX6cKiIa3Avy5xmXEaue7GFmU2Ss5mq_hLfqkrkSEb-ARR0bTh4JYgr9JMy_HyOk9HFHzUQcecNPA04HLvNb_cMN0WYRyG3bNwVTRT_HcIydZTQYL0YS6lEAXTKsCipKAtAHD1bKg6zpcvXUYy)
---
Friend,

I knew that when I signed up to run for Congress it wouldn’t be easy. Running for public office requires for one to put it all on the line.

**For the past 25 years,** **I’ve spent my time raising five children and educating the children of my fellow Americans**. I have __no dirty laundry_ _of which to speak – however, it does take some getting used to seeing your name in the newspaper, your face on a website, or in digital ads.

But the most**challenging part of running for Congress** as a conservative Republican woman is the names, **the insults and the racial slurs** the trolls on the internet have lobbed my way, seemingly only for one of two reasons:
1. Because**I’m a female Republican of color** with views of my own – which often diverge with others in the Black community.
2. **Because racism is alive and well in the United States**.

| [**Stand Against Racism
Donate Today»**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=28e0642e25fc4b719fa903df1b356834&_e=93rpokYiy2EVVWbXl-jz460utButGZ-B_GDOtpRu2G_BwsH6aZqtSIJLbevgH0INS-fiz-Xpu2-6V52ncaX0NfHT-Y_-XMjfqb-yPFZoAp0GTRfx_9BcYwp8ZC6vQSnwUVW4lBmqkPl2EFurkZmEohhlPx9rtVTz_Gtvumr-xRUQPAv7heUaYjVUySgeLMN04g-01r3IIsW-V96qr-UiGBb-6j-2VCK0Ky8V5YU68tirT6a6FlBbyxd2qStht8pc2NgVoE8_jmB3bcqkj4puaOrKbWxE3opOmYtOvnPpQlS76VBXCcp2NMhyPGKAbwBT)
---

Notice some of the more eloquent comments I’ve received in feedback from previous emails I’ve sent out to you and others around the country: ALERT: if you have an aversion to foul language – STOP reading now.

**Notable Comments:**
* “Truth is you’re just a “n****r”
* As far as reparations are concerned, the N*****S owe the white man reparations
* “You are screwed to believe Republicans will ever do any good for anyone but themselves”
* “Turn coat, Uncle Tom”
* “You’re a f******g uncle Thomasina dancing for the GOP”
* “F**k Off Racist “B***H”
* “Sellout”
* “I am for no black that is racist. And you sure are”

[**Stand Against Racism
Donate Today»**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=28e0642e25fc4b719fa903df1b356834&_e=93rpokYiy2EVVWbXl-jz460utButGZ-B_GDOtpRu2G_BwsH6aZqtSIJLbevgH0INS-fiz-Xpu2-6V52ncaX0NfHT-Y_-XMjfqb-yPFZoAp3SZMH61L-J0IfyBJHkSLR3QTdmqqL53hQ9ktEYAH7PmeYoaCYu99pqXjnWcabCeKKII7P8b5285ywY1Ijm_YkqH2vJwFauWOe9QL_rs89E7e5KSp9jdJpgAyUYtUJrOwWN000t4D5N_jX-9_XelbODFRmy22sem7_0lmnDAUOsSSTFbm60qYKGufSGoGp0g1UBXh_AK0T2brOH2pGaw5wo)
---

I have thick skin – these comments don’t bother me personally. What does bother me is that there are people out there that don’t seem to believe there is a place for a conservative like me in the Republican Party – or because of the color of my skin I’m expected to be a Democrat.

Some of the comments above are, indeed, from self-identified Democrats. Say what you want about President Trump, but ...
* **_Would a racist_** president stand for pro-life legislation when the majority of babies impacted by abortion are babies with disabilities and babies of color?

* **_Would a racist_** prioritize reducing prison sentences for non-violent crimes which disproportionately affect minority communities?

* **_Would a racist_** give the most money to historically black colleges and universities of any recent president?

As Republicans, **we should be _so proud_**.
[**Send a Black Conservative
To Congress »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=28e0642e25fc4b719fa903df1b356834&_e=93rpokYiy2EVVWbXl-jz460utButGZ-B_GDOtpRu2G_BwsH6aZqtSIJLbevgH0INS-fiz-Xpu2-6V52ncaX0NfHT-Y_-XMjfqb-yPFZoAp2k_mba9XUKKJxPMRyPmcQn_fPdAeD0s9vpM5MVrzVZIp_yr2MKGLnEuADBnEaCs6ft-v-qkNh42ZXsExq9f06MEWEDdMeOTqagjiIoDn1aq3lfR2QKboAkJR-G1BXCGb5pa9uW3gdofDZNZBCweF15_seiChdQ5i8HSh9LDlGjk2FVd4YTPjqIN-eefyYIX_JnXA0DwZSVS82VjgNsCIEW)
---

Just like EVERY OTHER AMERICAN, I’m entitled to my own opinion and my choice of political party.

Like every other email requesting financial support for my campaign that I’ve sent out, I fully expect to receive negative feedback.

**What I won’t tolerate is being the target of racial slurs simply because of what I stand for**.

If you’re pro-life, pro-business, a supporter of limited government and want to keep your private health insurance – **[then I’m asking you to stand with me today so that I can go to Washington to fight for you!](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=28e0642e25fc4b719fa903df1b356834&_e=93rpokYiy2EVVWbXl-jz460utButGZ-B_GDOtpRu2G_BwsH6aZqtSIJLbevgH0INS-fiz-Xpu2-6V52ncaX0NVjvDMywWe_CyQSh1ZeOi-FWsBP2wYp-Z7RmqSpqlwee5Le3f_lY1PmbhTLiqTnkbsXvT3d2j2j0t1lKLg7-im36mePFS_7w_Ywh5fRiSFtMg1NIIQNBG0wocgEi6sxKD5MzjqFRMJK5j7idH5duE5qLvBzZ7XVkrmJnsdxOBgbQjMfZCe41y0-cOIwiJibHF6n5Cd3ERfduPk9XCZtS3iiwxEtQibVybUijIRXNC5p8)**

I'm so grateful to you, Friend,

Blessings always,
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=28e0642e25fc4b719fa903df1b356834&_e=93rpokYiy2EVVWbXl-jz460utButGZ-B_GDOtpRu2G_BwsH6aZqtSIJLbevgH0INS-fiz-Xpu2-6V52ncaX0NVjvDMywWe_CyQSh1ZeOi-FttJh_dcRGC6JkAHtJ7oYS-f-cpL7lCLdt44VQRAa0dgG39y-jQ0jAnI3y59Nd4oe-kLIuXJgHhcNZwLo5uUcs2eZugVdNKiTWHfBUNjPxnH5vRAoLPVqtIEbu8G58WqpaPLJz3Kd9jfpGfzLfEBmcTlM_lt0lOb-89HBWXFyGuy7jfvwHoZatUywfyUP9qJbKRIfYSKhpQUNNH_DHGUoZ)
Dr. Lerah Lee

P.S: I’m on a mission to uplift ALL Americans, Friend, -- and **[I hope you’ll show your support by making a contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=28e0642e25fc4b719fa903df1b356834&_e=93rpokYiy2EVVWbXl-jz460utButGZ-B_GDOtpRu2G_BwsH6aZqtSIJLbevgH0INS-fiz-Xpu2-6V52ncaX0NVjvDMywWe_CyQSh1ZeOi-EOpvuwFIzTUiHhBFeufbbyJ6TF4WiAmSTtaeQ1_YCuQGwj7R0PA1S1veXreDB6oqx-YMMa1oUHtVH_0Ja9lvxsg2mtNbaLmYArukP4G8ZDENBco5r4gD75qD4BMRtGO-urm-ELYCTKvnfYwBW57ak6A2DRcoUCcH7itgiDCHCWOtz05PhxxLe703IVvtm2B6TIMwdqVnf_JbalmqcxhzPo)**
[**Send a Black Conservative
To Congress »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=28e0642e25fc4b719fa903df1b356834&_e=93rpokYiy2EVVWbXl-jz460utButGZ-B_GDOtpRu2G_BwsH6aZqtSIJLbevgH0INS-fiz-Xpu2-6V52ncaX0NfHT-Y_-XMjfqb-yPFZoAp3V-RPnobsyR_JxQTVAzKA9yOVZtCKM68zi3QHqnh5sblKIbqaXtxSSnMmjbyfJptRmqzd-zylvJaIwbSxIPABqiCuDn2v4Q0VDYvSyEHDLbRq7FFlOMMLTBt4b2Ob7qFPxQOzWURhEuSbV-5zb4uoNMtUmGPgBDOx9HD6sLyrbHXVYUX82IOEEpebP7kN56d4keZXfMtw0Z7Ur6aY1d-ye)
---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12254431/125830635/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGE3OGQ2MS03ZjEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtzTnhAc1E-kdCSwK0_e7B4bIr9RGzvRPLlQRrI2qxw=&emci=9fa78d61-7f10-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=a4a78d61-7f10-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)

Peter, **I have been working on something big. Let me tell you about it. ** Until three weeks ago, Terrell Blodgett, a World War II Army veteran, had never missed an election — not for 65 years. But in 2019 Texas Republicans enacted a new law to suppress the vote, HB 1888, that has particularly hurt older voters and students by banning “mobile voting locations” at schools and senior centers. **Like Mr. Blodgett says, “they ought to be encouraging the vote, not suppressing it!”** Today we are fighting back. This morning, I filed a lawsuit in federal court on behalf of Mr. Blodgett, the Texas Young Democrats, and the Texas College Democrats. My co-counsel is a national voting rights expert, Renea Hicks. The GOP is doing everything they can to suppress the vote. When less people vote, the GOP can stay in office. That is exactly why Republicans passed this law. [**I’m running a campaign that shows the type of representative I’ll be. Instead of making fundraising calls, I’m filing lawsuits to fight voter suppression. Donate today, and I will keep fighting on behalf of every person in the Texas 10th.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12254432/125830636/203122784?refcode=em112619&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGE3OGQ2MS03ZjEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtzTnhAc1E-kdCSwK0_e7B4bIr9RGzvRPLlQRrI2qxw=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12254433/125830637/203122784?refcode=em112619&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGE3OGQ2MS03ZjEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtzTnhAc1E-kdCSwK0_e7B4bIr9RGzvRPLlQRrI2qxw=)
Republicans are desperate to hold on to their waning power in our diverse state. They lose as young people get involved in the political process. So in the 2019 Legislative session, the GOP worked hard to kill temporary polling places at colleges and universities. The ban on mobile voting especially impacts people with disabilities and people with limited transportation. And in the context of continuing racially targeted voter suppression, it disproportionately hurts students at the state’s historically black colleges and universities, including Prairie View A&M in my district. Last year, I helped to defeat voter suppression tactics aimed at the students of Prairie View A&M. Today I took our latest fight for voting rights to the federal courts. I will never stop working for you. [**And I need your help to fight against voter suppression!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12254434/125830638/203122784?refcode=em112619&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGE3OGQ2MS03ZjEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtzTnhAc1E-kdCSwK0_e7B4bIr9RGzvRPLlQRrI2qxw=) name: Jason Yates
subject: An opportunity to equip a Christian voter
body:
| It’s your moment to make a difference | Peter, Giving Tuesday is one week from today. Are you ready to be a part of this historic day? Giving Tuesday started in 2012 as a simple idea in America: a day that encourages people to do good by participating in charitable giving. Last year, nearly 400 million dollars was raised for non-profit organizations across the country in one day! **On #GivingTuesday, we’re inviting you to be part of the solution in our nation:_Equip a Christian voter._** There are days when it feels like unborn life won’t be fully protected, businesses won’t be able to operate according to their religious convictions, and the battle to defend God’s definition of gender and marriage is a lost cause. **BUT there are 90-million Christians in America - and if they voted, it would forever change the course of our nation.** You have a tremendous opportunity to influence our nation in 2020.
* All 435 seats in the U.S. House of Representatives are up for election.
* Thirty-five Senate seats will be determined.
* The President of the United States will be chosen.
* Tens of thousands of state and local elections will take place across the nation.

What can you do? **Equip a Christian voter with a gift of $3.20**. Maybe you can equip one voter, two voters, or more. Partner with us on #GivingTuesday and - for the cost of a cup of coffee - you’ll provide all the resources and tools to activate a Christian to vote in 2020. **Plan to donate on Tuesday, December 3, and join us in our 24-hour #GivingTuesday campaign.[Don’t want to miss the date? Get a head start now](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191203apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191126apl01nd_no_opens&n=1).** We can all do something, and when we do, we will influence the nation with God’s principles in 2020. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191203apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191126apl01nd_no_opens&n=2)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191126apl01nd_no_opens&n=3).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191126apl01nd_no_opens&n=4) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191126apl01nd_no_opens&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191126apl01nd_no_opens&n=6)

name: Preston, MJ Hegar for Texas
subject: Washington Post: "TX Senate seat among top 10 most likely to flip"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
The Dallas Morning News called the U.S. Senate contest "the most watched-race in Texas," and The Washington Post said Texas' Senate seat is one of the top 10 most likely to flip!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098b/7f51f7bc/4b9b2f97/4ef08140/2270088201/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Did you see the good news, Peter?

_The Dallas Morning News_ called the U.S. Senate contest "**the most watched-race in Texas** ," and _The Washington Post_ said **Texas ' Senate seat is one of the top 10 most likely to flip!**

But that's only going to happen if we have the resources to stand up to Senator Cornyn's nearly $11 million war chest, on top of the **$25 million in pledged spending from a super PAC to defend him**. And since MJ's not taking money from corporate PACs, she's relying on your support to compete.

**Will you make your first donation today to help us keep building the momentum we 'll need to defeat Senator Cornyn and elect MJ?*** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
****[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098b/7f51f7bc/4b9b2f97/4ef08147/2270088201/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191125.1nd__543__&amount=5")****
****[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098b/7f51f7bc/4b9b2f97/4ef08146/2270088201/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191125.1nd__543__&amount=10")****
****[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098b/7f51f7bc/4b9b2f97/4ef08145/2270088201/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191125.1nd__543__&amount=25")****
****[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098b/7f51f7bc/4b9b2f97/4ef08144/2270088201/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191125.1nd__543__&amount=50")****
******[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098b/7f51f7bc/4b9b2f97/4ef081bb/2270088201/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191125.1nd__543__")******
Remember, Texas is a HUGE state -- there are **20 media markets, 254 counties, and 28 million people.** MJ needs to spread her message to _**all of them**_ , making Texas one of the most expensive states to campaign in by far.

We need to hire staff, travel the state, and run ads to build the movement we need to win in 2020. The money we raise _now_ will determine how much of that we'll be able to do -- **if we wait until next year, it will be too late!**

[**So Peter, please make your first donation now and give MJ the resources she needs to stand up to Sen. Cornyn 's special interest money and win!***](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098b/7f51f7bc/4b9b2f97/4ef081ba/2270088201/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191125.1nd__543__&amount=10&recurring=true")

Thanks,

Preston Elliott
Campaign Manager

*If you've already contributed to the campaign or donated through a different source, thank you so much! Our records are based on our online database which may take some time to update.

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489098b/7f51f7bc/4b9b2f97/4ef081ba/2270088201/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191125.1nd__543__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|

MJ for Texas

Round Rock, TX 78683

name: Team Ed Markey
subject: ACTION: Say NO to offshore drilling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello: Ed Markey is fighting back against President Trump's plan to expand offshore drilling.

The risk is too great. An oil spill would devastate our economy and would be detrimental to our environment.

_**[Stand with Ed Markey against President Trump and Big Oil. Click here to sign the petition and say NO to offshore drilling!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df09/693b8b0a/43a991f5/72de7a6d/3573774920/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df09/693b8b0a/43a991f5/72de7a6d/3573774920/VEsE/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")****_
Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *

Hello,

President Donald Trump is desperate to open up our coastal waters to Big Oil for drilling.

An oil spill would cripple our economy and devastate our environment. I will never support irresponsible corporate fossil fuel interests over the needs of the businesses, communities, and ecosystems that make up our beautiful coastlines.

_**_**[Stand with me against President Trump and Big Oil. Click here to sign the petition and say no to offshore drilling!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df09/693b8b0a/43a991f5/72de7a6d/3573774920/VEsF/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df09/693b8b0a/43a991f5/72de7a6d/3573774920/VEsC/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")****_
We need to stand up and say NO to offshore drilling and start saying YES to offshore wind farms, solar power, and electric vehicles as the way for the future.

But the Trump administration recently blocked the permitting an 800-megawatt offshore wind farm, leaving tens of thousands of jobs hanging in the balance.

I'm not giving up. The Green New Deal revolution is changing everything, and we're just getting started.

Republicans have a chance to change and work with us to put these policies in place, but if they don't, they are going to be changed at the ballot box.

_**_**[Sign the petition and stand against President Trump and Big Oil. Say NO to offshore drilling!](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df09/693b8b0a/43a991f5/72de7a6d/3573774920/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")**_**_

_****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df09/693b8b0a/43a991f5/72de7a6d/3573774920/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/markey/")****_
Thanks,

Ed
---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---
Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df09/693b8b0a/43a991f5/72de7a6c/3573774920/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://action.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

[http://www.edmarkey.com](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df09/693b8b0a/43a991f5/72de7a63/3573774920/VEsO/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://www.edmarkey.com")

name: Cory Booker
subject: We've raised $1,136,557.53 since I walked off the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
I know you're probably saving up for Black Friday, but I have an ask
| | |
---
| Team, I wanted to share some exciting news. **My team tells me we've raised exactly $1,136,557.53‬ toward our $1.5 million end-of-month goal.** Meeting this goal will allow us to make some of the big investments we'll need to win. However, we still have $363,442.47 left to raise -- and only a few more days to do it. November is known as a difficult month for fundraising, so we're not taking anything for granted. Falling short now, as we're starting to pick up serious momentum, would be a huge setback. **Will you chip in now to help us hit our $1.5 million goal by 11:59 p.m. on Saturday?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191126_CB_20191126-fr-CB-$1million-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

body:
I know everyone has a busy week ahead, so I wanted to take a moment to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12258553/125867930/480453248?refcode=em_thanksgiving_2019.11.26_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTJjM2ZkZi04ZDEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dncXxc4dGFW-OtytYa0dX0vrLAEvALRBhMojI198BC4=) Hey friend,

I know everyone has a busy week ahead, so I wanted to take a moment to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving. I hope you are able to spend some quality time with your friends, family, and loved ones this week.

I am always grateful for time to relax and reflect on the last year and look ahead at what’s to come. It has been quite a year for our family and next year, as the campaign ramps up, it’ll only be more exciting. One of the things I’m most grateful for is to have your support. We’ve built an amazing grassroots movement right here in Pennsylvania, and together, I know we can flip PA-10 blue.

From my family to yours, I hope you have a very happy Thanksgiving!

Eugene ** **

subject: "STANDING OUT - Bennet has plan to move America forward"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| [Team - look what a major New Hampshire newspaper just said about Michael:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba997/134673f2/9cbfc82/6997a22e/3244181188/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba997/134673f2/9cbfc82/6997a22e/3244181188/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") One of New Hampshire's biggest newspapers has a lot to say about Michael's ideas to move our country forward:

[_" Bennet has plans - big plans - that date back almost a decade."_](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba997/134673f2/9cbfc82/6997a22e/3244181188/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

American families want a Democrat who not only can beat Donald Trump in 2020, but also who offers real solutions to our nation's greatest challenges.

[Michael is the only candidate to win two national races in a ruggedly independent state. By presenting a compelling and unifying vision, he won in a terrible year for Democrats.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba997/134673f2/9cbfc82/6997a22e/3244181188/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Team - Michael knows how to win tough elections, and he knows we can't win this alone. We have until Saturday at midnight to raise $1OO,OOO! Will you make your first donation and fuel this campaign to victory?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba997/134673f2/9cbfc82/6997a22e/3244181188/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba997/134673f2/9cbfc82/6997a22d/3244181188/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
The pundits considered us a long shot back in 2010 -- some are saying the same thing now.

[We proved them wrong before, and we'll do it again.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba997/134673f2/9cbfc82/6997a22e/3244181188/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_112619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Hitting our $1OO,OOO deadline won't be easy. But neither were Michael's two victories in Colorado.

[So we're asking, team, will you step up now and chip in today? body:
I'm reaching out to you because I know you are a huge supporter of President Trump and his America First agenda.

Friend, we need to talk.

I'm reaching out to you because I know you are a huge supporter of President Trump and his America First agenda.

**But, here 's the thing:** In order to keep our country on track, we must take back the House from Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and the out of control Democrats.

Our CRITICAL FEC End of Month deadline is only 4 days away and we are still short of our goal. [**I am calling on you to pitch in BEFORE midnight. name: Andrew Yang
subject: Tough decision to make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1) Yang Gang --

We’ve got a tough decision to make.

Tonight, we have to determine if we can keep our ads up on the air another week.

If we raise $210,000 by midnight, our ads will stay up in New Hampshire and Iowa.

**[We can’t do this without you. Your donation of $10 or more will determine if we can keep our ads going.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17935?t=5&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17935?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17935?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17935?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17935?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17935?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17935?t=8&amount=25&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1)
---
These early voting states will set the tone for the entire election, which means moving the polls there will move polls across the country.

We need to finish the year strong -- and you’re the only one who can ensure that happens.

**[Can we count on you? Donate whatever you can before midnight tonight to keep our ads on the air.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17935?t=7&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1)**

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17935?t=6&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3690%2E377263%2ECRfXv1) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Susan Collins's re-election hopes are crashing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In the midst of the impeachment inquiry, the president has been sweet-talking the senators who will serve as the jury during his almost certain trial. Guess which "moderate" went to meet with him? Susan Collins has spent the last 20 years keeping her Senate seat by pretending to be a moderate. Like Lucy with the football, she tries to make us believe that this time, she'll save us and actually be a voice of reason. But when push comes to shove? She puts Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court. She says she's a moderate on immigration? She just voted to elevate the guy who designed Trump's plan to rip immigrant children seeking asylum away from their families and put them in cages. People are finally starting to catch on that she's not just going to pull the football out from under us \-- she'll make sure it has a lifetime appointment to slam us in the head, too. She has a job approval rating of just 35% in Maine. She lost the endorsement of the League of Conservation Voters because of her capitulation to propping up Trump's anti-environment, climate change-denying, soul-crushing administration. _The Cook Political Report_ has classified her Senate race in 2020 as a "toss-up." This is the MOST VULNERABLE she's ever been. This race in Maine is KEY to Democrats winning back the Senate, so we know Mitch McConnell and the GOP will flood Maine with millions in dark money for Republicans to hold onto the majority. But Democrats have an incredible chance this cycle to take down Susan Collins and take back the Senate: her name is Sara Gideon. She's a leader in the fight against climate change in Maine, a steadfast supporter of Medicaid expansion and _Roe v. Wade_ , and she's not about to sell out her values for corrupt corporate sponsorship. 97% of her funding comes from donations of $100 or less. We can flip this Senate seat. We can get rid of Susan Collins and take back the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell. But because Sara is entirely funded by grassroots donations, we can only win if engaged Democrats like you get involved in this race now. [**If you care about getting dark money out of politics, protecting our healthcare access and not letting another Brett Kavanaugh anywhere near the Supreme Court, please fight back against Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins by donating anything, even just $1, today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcfc/6e9863e8/16a42f64/1db0a7c2/2715721501/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191126a.ND&refcode2=3rFdsTQNfZbJtozxutui") Your support is critical to Democrats taking back the Senate in 2020. Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcfc/6e9863e8/16a42f64/1db0a7c0/2715721501/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sara-gideon-nd?refcode=OUT20191126a.ND&refcode2=3rFdsTQNfZbJtozxutui")

name: mike thompson (personal)
subject: checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter - I'll get right to it: tonight, we'll face a critical fundraising deadline, and we're still $1,053 of where we need to be. Can I count on your support? We have to show that we're backing all vulnerable House Democrats.

name: Sara Gideon
subject: When someone chips in $10, $5, or whatever they can afford, I know they're really saying "I want to be a part of this grassroots movement."
body:
I can't do this alone.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f61/4bef7a87/6bb8f54f/287ffc8f/3415592779/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
Every time we get a donation, I'm more grateful than I can say.
That's because I know when someone chips in $10, $5, or whatever they can afford, they're really saying "I want to be a part of this grassroots movement."
**I 'm proud to be funding our campaign that way, instead of through corporate PAC money -- but that does mean I have to ask:**
**[Will you make a $3 contribution to support our campaign today? Our team set a goal of raising $150,000 before we close the books on November, and we could really use your help to get there.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f61/4bef7a87/6bb8f54f/287ffc8e/3415592779/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjYtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191126-1-full")**
I mean it when I say, I can't do this alone. Susan Collins is a 22-year incumbent with the entire Republican party establishment backing her.
Defeating her next year is going to take a really big grassroots team. That's why I'm so glad to know you're by my side in this fight.
All my best,
_Sara_
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f61/4bef7a87/6bb8f54f/287ffc8e/3415592779/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjYtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191126-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f61/4bef7a87/6bb8f54f/287ffc8d/3415592779/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f61/4bef7a87/6bb8f54f/287ffc8c/3415592779/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Mike Turner
subject: I need your help before Saturday 11:59PM
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
I need your help before Saturday at 11:59PM

In just a few short days, the most important fundraising deadline of my campaign will be here.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

In just a few short days... http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

Peter,

Thank you for being a valued member of my team.

In just a few short days, the most important fundraising deadline of my campaign will be here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0. I’m connecting with you in advance to see if you can help me reach the goal that I have set to be in a position to defend Ohio jobs and keep fighting for you. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

We have already seen just how far Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and the Squad will take their congressional majority with their investigations aimed to remove a duly elected president from office.

Donate to hold Pelosi & Schiff accountable for their partisan impeachment investigation before Saturday @ 11:59 PM>>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

My opponent is a Washington lobbyist who would ally with Pelosi and Schiff if elected. To defeat her in 2020, I’m going to need the help of patriots just like you to prevent the attacks of the unlimited financial resources that liberal groups aim to pour into our district on her behalf.

Like the squad socialists, my opponent would support Medicare Care for All, open borders, and amnesty for those who entered this country illegally.

The contrast between me and my opponent could not be clearer. I have a history of leadership in Congress and bringing back jobs to this area. Without your support, Ohio stands to lose out on thousands of jobs. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

While in Congress, I have fought each and every day to bring more jobs and funding to Wright-Patterson Air Force Base and the Dayton area. I have also led on the important issue of eradicating the opioid epidemic in our state.

I hope you agree that we must protect the gains that we have made since President Trump’s election in 2016 and help restore the Republican House majority with a donation today!

Any donation you may give you will go a long way to help me reach this critical goal before Saturday’s 11:59 PM deadline! http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

Thank you,

Mike Turner

DONATE
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER

120 W. Second St. #1510 Dayton, OH 45402

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDExOTkyMzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjM5MDc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0

body:
