| | Peter, I just have a quick favor to ask of you.

When we started our campaign to take back Oklahoma's 5th district and really the whole House of Representatives for conservatives we made a video outlining our campaign's values.

But there's still tons of people who have yet to see it. [**Will you share, tweet, or forward it to three friends of yours so that we can get the word out about our campaign?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=81aa0fb06a&e=795c6d9796)

Incumbent politicians ALWAYS have an advantage with name ID, and if we're serious about defeating Kendra Horn in 2020 we have to be fresh in voters' minds.
---

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. **That's why we need your help.**

[**Please share, tweet, or forward this video so that we can reach as many voters as possible and win back the House for conservatives!**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f0acc68ab2&e=795c6d9796)

subject: Three sentences

body:
My team is telling me we're falling behind our November fundraising goal.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d91c/7dfbb003/42ad7011/5527b047/964967909/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191126_em_starteom&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191126_em_starteom&source=rtw_20191126_em_starteom")

Hi friend,

I'll be brief: I'm reaching out to you today because my team is telling me we're falling behind in our November fundraising.

Running to serve this community is a joy, and as your representative, I will work tirelessly for the working families like mine right here in North Carolina. But to do that--I need your help.

**I hope you can be fearless with me today and help me achieve our vision of a 2nd District with a leader who serves, first and foremost, with integrity.**

**You can donate using this link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d91c/7dfbb003/42ad7011/5527b044/964967909/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191126_em_starteom&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatemonikajohnson&utm_campaign=rtw_20191126_em_starteom&source=rtw_20191126_em_starteom")**

Grateful for your support,

Monika

As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. name: Laura Loomer
subject: The secret to Thanksgiving mashed potatoes
body:
Before we start the holiday, I wanted to send over one of my favorite Thanksgiving recipes: Patriot Potatoes!
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354577-826834-4730470-6e895ce9d9-5999355441)
Patriot,

Before we start the holiday, I wanted to send over one of my favorite Thanksgiving recipes: Patriot Potatoes!

I promise you’ll love these.

This is a holiday twist to mashed potatoes, and you can add in as much "kick" as you like:
* Peel and quarter 8 medium Yukon Gold potatoes and add them to 2 cups of heavy cream and 2 cups of whole milk.
* Add 4 peeled and smashed garlic cloves, 4 sprigs of thyme, and 1 bay leaf.
* Now gently boil for 15 minutes until the potatoes are fully cooked.
* Remove from heat and STRAIN the potatoes BUT KEEP the cream.
* Remove the thyme, bay leaf, and any remaining garlic.
* Now here's the secret that makes them unique: mash the potatoes and FOLD in the cream mixture.
* Finally, fold in a tablespoon of olive oil, 2 tablespoons of butter, a tablespoon (or more to taste) of whole-grain mustard (trust me) and add kosher salt and pepper to taste.

And that’s it!

I hope you enjoy it, and it's a small token of appreciation to thank you for supporting my campaign.

If you haven’t already done so, [**please don’t forget to donate $25 before the close of November**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354577-826834-4730469-3b2533c92e-5999355441), so we have a strong fundraising report that the Fake News Media will lament!

And if you're traveling, please do be safe, and if you can try out this recipe, please do respond to this email later and let me know what you think!

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Laura Loomer

P.S. We're just a few days away before November comes to a close, and we're only a few thousand dollars short of our fundraising goal. [**Will you chip in $25 to help close the gap?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354577-826834-4730469-3b2533c92e-5999355441) Thank you again for everything.

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump to Pick Between ‘Bread’ and ‘Butter’ at Annual Turkey Pardoning Ceremony
body:
"The White House released the names of the two turkeys up for consideration for the title of ‘National Thanksgiving Turkey’ at the..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=693a552956&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump to Pick Between ‘Bread****’****and****‘****Butter’ at Annual Turkey Pardoning Ceremony**

“The White House released the names of the two turkeys up for consideration for the title of ‘National Thanksgiving Turkey’ at the official turkey pardoning ceremony: Bread and Butter. President Donald Trump will issue a presidential pardon to the turkeys [today] ahead of Thanksgiving, as part of the annual holiday tradition that was made official in 1989 under former President George H.W. Bush,” Jeanine Santucci writes in _USA Today_.

“Last year, Peas the turkey beat out Carrots for the title, but both were pardoned and sent to live out their days in Virginia at Gobbler's Rest, where they are cared for by Virginia Tech students and veterinarians.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c037d5ce9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| House Democrats have a problem: Support for impeachment continues to fall as their marathon TV hearings produce no actual evidence of wrongdoing by the President. Now, even Democrats’ own voters are losing interest. According to a new Hill-HarrisX poll released yesterday, “the number of Democratic voters who say they are paying close attention to the impeachment inquiry fell 5 percentage points,” [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f11019ee2d&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|
---
| “The dog injured during the mission that killed ISIS leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi was honored Monday afternoon during a surprise ceremony at the White House, with President Trump, Vice President Pence and First Lady Melania in attendance.” The President gave “Conan” a medal and a plaque, Nick Givas reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7757eff474&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump is donating his third-quarter salary to help tackle the nation’s opioid epidemic. A White House official says Trump has given the $100,000 he would be paid in the quarter to the Office of the Assistant Secretary of Health,” Zeke Miller writes for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=355e1187e4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| During the holiday season, American shoppers face a significant risk of purchasing counterfeit goods. To confront that rising e-commerce threat, President Trump signed a Memorandum on Combating Trafficking in Counterfeit and Pirated Goods this year, White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro and Intellectual Property Enforcement Coordinator for OMB Vishal Amin write for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=43afcfc3d9&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8ebd53b2c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fa9310ed8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4182793e3d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
I want to thank you for being part of this team. There is a lot happening in Washington and it can be easy to focus on the hearings on the hill or to get sucked in to the Democratic presidential primary.
These are both consequential things, and unseating Donald Trump is more important than ever before. But it's also important to remember that a Democratic president can only be so successful without the backing of a Democratic Senate -- and New Hampshire is critical to winning back the majority. That's why I'm emailing you today.
We're coming up on the end of November and we're just shy of hitting 1,000 donations this month. With the media focused elsewhere, that's really impressive!
I'd love to cross 1,000 gifts before midnight and it looks like you haven't given online yet this month.**[Team, can I count on you to donate $3 or more today to help us hit that goal? I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, so every deadline and every dollar makes a huge impact.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc30e/2a380d31/3d1a1b37/f0e7ae/458635699/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTEyNl9zdXByZWMtMl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20191126_suprec-2_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
Thank you again for being part of this team. I'm so glad to have you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc30e/2a380d31/3d1a1b37/f0e7ae/458635699/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTEyNl9zdXByZWMtMl82bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20191126_suprec-2_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc30e/2a380d31/3d1a1b37/f0e7af/458635699/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Maggie for NH

Concord, NH 03302 United States

Friend —

Morning Consult just released its latest poll of early state primary voters, and it has Tom surging to fourth place! **Tom is running for president because it’s clear that the issues facing our nation and planet aren’t going to be fixed by a Washington insider.** We need bold structural reforms like congressional term limits, immediate action on climate, and a leader who’s willing to tell the truth about our broken government. These new polling numbers show that voters hear that message, and they agree — and that’s something to celebrate. Now’s the time to keep this momentum going — **chip in $1 today to be a founding grassroots donor for 2020:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | | Friend — Morning Consult just released its latest poll of early state primary voters, and it has Tom surging to fourth place! Tom is running for president because it’s clear that the issues facing our nation and planet aren’t going to be fixed by a Washington insider. We need bold structural reforms like congressional term limits, immediate action on climate, and a leader who’s willing to tell the truth about our broken government. These new polling numbers show that voters hear that message, and they agree — and that’s something to celebrate. Now’s the time to keep this momentum going — chip in $1 today to be a founding grassroots donor for 2020: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | We have the power to give a real voice in this primary to the issues of climate change and corporate greed. November's been a long month. We've had impeachment hearings, a Democratic debate, and billionaires galore.

In the midst of the seemingly endless news, we wanted to take a moment to highlight the grassroots movement we're building. So, here are just a few of the amazing things that we did together this month:

* Opened our first office in Michigan, and our first in Chicago
* Welcomed Black Womxn For and New Florida Majority to this movement
* Hit 85,000 selfies taken with Elizabeth
* Called voters with Fair Fight Action
* Knocked doors all across the country, from California to Maine (rain or shine!)

**We've got even more planned for December -- to outwork, out-organize, and out-last. And we need your help to make it all happen.**

**[Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is in just four days, and the resources we raise now will power our to-do list for December and January. Will you make your first donation right now to help hit this important fundraising goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b45b/45c30650/119933273/66f68a8d/246131283/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFXRl9FT01fR1JNX1FfMjAxOTExMjZfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1WF_EOM_GRM_Q_20191126_V1S3_P")**

>
The news can be overwhelming.

The bad news, in particular. We see corruption in this administration daily. We still haven't addressed the big issues facing our country or our planet. And while the rich keep reaping the rewards from Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's tax cuts, it's getting harder and harder for working families to make ends meet.

**But change will only happen when we make it happen.

Change will only happen when we take time during a busy month to demand that our government stop working for the rich and powerful -- and start working for the rest of us.**

**[Each month, we have a chance to change what's on the news. Right now, we have a chance to grow this grassroots movement-- and together, we can hit our November fundraising goal. If you can, please make a grassroots contribution today.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b45b/45c30650/119933273/66f68a8d/246131283/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFXRl9FT01fR1JNX1FfMjAxOTExMjZfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1WF_EOM_GRM_Q_20191126_V1S3_P")**

Thanks again for all you do,

Team Warren

clean_body: We see corruption in this administration daily. We still haven't addressed the big issues facing our country or our planet. And while the rich keep reaping the rewards from Donald Trump and Mitch... | | | "" November's been a long month. We've had impeachment hearings, a Democratic debate, and billionaires galore. In the midst of the seemingly endless news, we wanted to take a moment to highlight the grassroots movement we're building. So, here are just a few of the amazing things that we did together this month: Opened our first office in Michigan, and our first in Chicago Welcomed Black Womxn For and New Florida Majority to this movement Hit 85,000 selfies taken with Elizabeth Called voters with Fair Fight Action Knocked doors all across the country, from California to Maine (rain or shine!) We've got even more planned for December -- to outwork, out-organize, and out-last. And we need your help to make it all happen. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" The news can be overwhelming. The bad news, in particular. We see corruption in this administration daily. We still haven't addressed the big issues facing our country or our planet. And while the rich keep reaping the rewards from Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's tax cuts, it's getting harder and harder for working families to make ends meet. But change will only happen when we make it happen. Change will only happen when we take time during a busy month to demand that our government stop working for the rich and powerful -- and start working for the rest of us. ""** Thanks again for all you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: When policy is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Unfortunately, I’m the only candidate in this race who’s talking about these issues. That’s because when policy is personal, it dictates what you fight for and how hard you fight. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.2x1/8e2-lkHJSZiZWwSViD2nSQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7bZSH0odLn9-2FguGyXmsVENiDHXMVznbFWVtOvRcoOa0TCbkFpPWeQSYinOemQDquNGaYB4Q-2B6S0dctLjXS01FoD1OclLvwy5umsHwQrBnqLSAZnU9aEIC-2BrM-2BWMQ-2Blyitr0qE3mZaXMbXyDyECTugIkuhkoq7UrEc8DU3R7NfdS1-2BY8fKsn4lPzOuODIHynWsfXdCAo4mAzGk93vnY0l9mtUA7o7oqOWuUsd4NPqYrZhYo0-2BaUZqNT0Ixdrg0uzgd/Mp_i)
Friend, When people ask me why I’m running for Congress, I tell them it’s because, for me, policy is personal. My grandmother cleaned homes for a living, and when childcare was too expensive, she took me with her. So when I talk about the need for universal childcare, **_that’s personal for me_**. I graduated from law school with over $120,000 in student loans. Many of my friends in New York’s 17th District, despite having degrees, must still live at home with their parents because it’s too expensive for them to be out on their own. So when I talk about the need for student debt forgiveness and tuition-free public college, **_that’s personal for me_**. Unfortunately, I’m the only candidate in this race who’s talking about these issues. That’s because when policy is personal, it dictates what you fight for and how hard you fight. __ **[Will you chip in $5 so I can bring that fight to Congress?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.2x1/8e2-lkHJSZiZWwSViD2nSQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7bZSH0odLn9-2FguGyXmsVENiDHXMVznbFWVtOvRcoOa0QvKhIYtAGOYnQ0s0lTAkSvqA07C2rSuzSDckn3mw5Y84xzezB4ORoL1vLHIISjirLKpt6eyFJiuL4JkzzRSfMPdv5S5D70sMN7sjPykNgDRX27zhvbfKNAjQw4xXiIsRsUpEqcUqj30AJ8ukc5DnDFiXO6bGp3YpIgzdS4Ia0UWyUFX12nHodak9fPjZciRvJEnzehPddPeOPy342Rm9VA/PVx1)****[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.2x1/8e2-lkHJSZiZWwSViD2nSQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7bZSH0odLn9-2FguGyXmsVENiDHXMVznbFWVtOvRcoOa0QZ8EEiSv-2FOLBxgJIC6tS0xY2oMM5jE3ZzWt-2FRQLsShekE8fd7-2Fr6mFLxnxB2ZmquC-2FfsUVufqitpNzfkKUNQgYm0DJAU7WqTXzQ2QQVDQ3Ii-2ByRunFgaEHAw2I2mJIyZlOWgTM4vO-2Fb6TyQ2B628rrmYa8QUSDdoII1kTX-2BUcTg0jtmTX-2FkYWNanbAO0tBsKqcr3AxqWUKrMUhqIqqU28F/8XJ4)****_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.2x1/8e2-lkHJSZiZWwSViD2nSQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7bZSH0odLn9-2FguGyXmsVENiDHXMVznbFWVtOvRcoOa0SmTIkTi6htAMcN-2ByGLh4A1XxRgD7Zr3yDfNdqq51wzZiVlcIrtVeY8T-2BlYWf2nVeQzyuzLOJmLmexr7ZC-2FyYjIBieZsai9WFUhFdakmjPt6rKNYTKP3JBMjHOH2rsKW439QCtsHnhbVOfQbj3G6CizbffY3pXgU8Phfev2qCSWo601x3pUxYr0-2BdAsDRIRkaPOdIdH7lbz018dkKglq6Cy/loCP)_** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HgE/ni0YAA/t.2x1/8e2-lkHJSZiZWwSViD2nSQ/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNI6ZD1Rt5h1a2lEaSmdVgH7bZSH0odLn9-2FguGyXmsVENiDHXMVznbFWVtOvRcoOa0Qrgmm5IWdxE8262au3CVQ-2BGy1otYRU-2BuNq-2BZ-2BvkxYINebYhCCWGreLVkiQuwOf-2FntPrpnW3klyucXtzgVH7rskJjz4Pxn-2FtyHxrtKfor49o4BWM-2BQ3D7x8zOwqKXT3KL-2BfB7p-2Bz-2FmfQ-2FLFhreekxMDcXst5pUUbKi4Fy6MD5Zo-2BDY6zRHbaGfprFnpaJpKmjYKKed6mE9LEuBpHO0Ow30H/FPkG) **** My family didn’t come from money. I was raised by a single mother who worked multiple jobs, and we still needed food stamps. Growing up, we had to be resourceful with what we had to make ends meet. Despite the odds, I got my chance at getting an education and experiencing the magic of the American dream. **Unfortunately, I know not everyone gets that chance.** Even though years have gone by since my own childhood, so many of the same problems exist. Friend, I know we can do better — _we must do better._ That’s why we started this campaign and why we’re unapologetically fighting for a bold progressive agenda. **Real, meaningful change for families means providing affordable, universal child care, tuition-free public college, and student debt forgiveness.** **[Will you work with me to make this future a reality? name: Tracy Newman
subject: Because we just have to, trust me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can't miss this.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7591?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=3&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS) Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Jay's note -- because this is important. I've been on Jay's team for years now, and I know that we can't just expect a win here. The results of our election earlier this month -- where two incredibly progressive ballot initiatives were voted down -- proves that clear as day. I also know how hard the freeze is on our momentum -- and on our overall numbers. We really do depend on grassroots fundraising, and with just three weeks to go before we have to stop cold, _every single dollar makes a difference._ [**We set an aggressive goal because I believe we can hit it, but also because we have to. Donate $1 or more now before tomorrow’s midnight deadline and let's raise $30,000 together.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7591?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=4&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7592?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=5&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)

Thanks,
Tracy
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Monday, Nov 25, 2019
Subject: A big number for a big reason
Listen, friend --
I know Thanksgiving is coming up, and I know you have plenty on your plate (metaphorically and actually!) this week -- but we can't let up right now.
We're less than three weeks away from our legally mandated fundraising stop: On December 14th, we have to stop fundraising for _nearly four months_ during the Washington state legislative session freeze. Many of our opponents in this race can keep on going. The RGA certainly won't let up, but as long as the Washington state legislature is in session, we can't raise a dime.
**So we've set an online goal of $30,000 to raise before Wednesday -- it's a big number for a big reason. There's so much to do here in Washington state, and that progress and success is emulated across the country. The progress we make here is what's at stake, and we're a huge target right now:**
[**Make a grassroots donation of $1 or more right now, and let's raise $30,000 before Thanksgiving!**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7591?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=11&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7592?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=12&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7593?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=13&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7594?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=14&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7595?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=15&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7596?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=16&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7597?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=17&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)
---
There were just three huge governor's races in Kentucky, Mississippi, and Louisiana -- and Democrats won two of them! That's a huge success.
But it means the Republican Governors Association will be that much more desperate for a big win in 2020, and they only have a few options. My seat is one of them.
And while we pride ourselves on being an incredibly progressive state, this month's elections showed that nothing is certain here. We just lost two really big ballot initiatives -- it's up to us to ensure the governorship isn't next.
**All this is why we have an aggressive fundraising goal to hit by Wednesday -- before Thanksgiving, before our fundraising freeze: $30,000 in grassroots donations. Can we count on you to make one of them?** [**Donate $1 or more now to fund the fight ahead.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7591?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=18&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7591?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=19&akid=7994%2E868730%2EPaasNS)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks, Tracy \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Jay Inslee Date: Monday, Nov 25, 2019 Subject: A big number for a big reason Listen, friend -- I know Thanksgiving is coming up, and I know you have plenty on your plate (metaphorically and actually!) this week -- but we can't let up right now. We're less than three weeks away from our legally mandated fundraising stop: On December 14th, we have to stop fundraising for nearly four months during the Washington state legislative session freeze. Many of our opponents in this race can keep on going. The RGA certainly won't let up, but as long as the Washington state legislature is in session, we can't raise a dime. So we've set an online goal of $30,000 to raise before Wednesday -- it's a big number for a big reason. There's so much to do here in Washington state, and that progress and success is emulated across the country. The progress we make here is what's at stake, and we're a huge target right now: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | There were just three huge governor's races in Kentucky, Mississippi, and Louisiana -- and Democrats won two of them! That's a huge success. But it means the Republican Governors Association will be that much more desperate for a big win in 2020, and they only have a few options. My seat is one of them. And while we pride ourselves on being an incredibly progressive state, this month's elections showed that nothing is certain here. We just lost two really big ballot initiatives -- it's up to us to ensure the governorship isn't next. All this is why we have an aggressive fundraising goal to hit by Wednesday -- before Thanksgiving, before our fundraising freeze: $30,000 in grassroots donations. Can we count on you to make one of them? Very truly yours, Jay

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
Dear,

Throughout the week we had seen giant beams of light moving through the
night sky over El Paso and Ciudad Juárez. Saturday night after Ulysses’
basketball game at the Delta center, we drove down to Bowie High School,
where the lights on the El Paso side of the border originated, to learn
more.

The lights it turned out were part of an installation known as “Border
Tuner” or “Sintonizador Fronterizo.” Participants here and at a location
in Juárez were able to control the beams of light — and when a beam of
light from El Paso intersected with a beam of light from Juárez, the
participants on both sides of the border could suddenly hear each other
and speak to each other.

At one point on Saturday night a DJ in El Paso was transmitting music on
his beam of light and a woman in Juárez was singing along on hers. All of
us could listen as their beams were joined.

A little later Amy and Ulysses and I stepped up to the mic and introduced
ourselves to whoever might be listening on the other side.

“Hola, me llamo Beto. Como se llama usted?”

“Catalina” came the response from the other side of the river.

“Y cuantos años tiene, Catalina?”

“Diez.”

“Yo tengo cuarenta y siete,” I told her.

I then shared my kids’ ages and asked her what sports she played:

“Tengo hijos de trece, once y nueve años. Cuales deportes juega,
Catalina?”

“Taekwondo,” she answered.

I encouraged Ulysses to speak. He stepped up to the mic and told her he
played basketball, “yo juego baloncesto.”

We then watched and listened as others spoke to people across the river
through these beams of light. A family who followed us turned the dial
that moved the light beam so that it connected with a different light beam
from Juárez. A new conversation began, with a different family, about food
and music.

There were tens of thousands of people on both sides of the border who
participated, able to talk and listen to each other regardless of the
political or national divisions or the physical distances. Sometimes
profound conversations about history and art, sometimes playful
conversations between young people who were getting to know one another (a
young woman in Juárez asked a young man in El Paso, “eres guapo?”),
sometimes collaborative music compositions, sometimes families talking
about sports and their favorite kinds of foods (Catalina told us hers were
tacos).

Rafael Lozano-Hemmer, the artist who conceived the project, told me that
he wasn’t so much building bridges between Juárez and El Paso as he was
illuminating the connections that already exist — connections of family,
of history, of culture, of language, of people.

Border Tuner was beautiful and it helped us to remember or see in a
different way how special the U.S.-Mexico border is. Not a place to be
afraid of, not something to lock down or wall-off. It’s a place to
celebrate and share with one another. At its best it’s an example of how
people can be good to each other... a timely example given the divisions
in our country and the willingness of some to try to make us believe our
differences are dangerous.

It reminded me to be grateful for where I live and for the people of this
binational community. And how important it is to tell our story, lest it
be told for us or against us.

Amy and I are going to spend Thanksgiving in El Paso with family who will
be coming in from all over. We’re hoping to get in some great hikes in the
Franklins, maybe see a couple of movies. Eat a lot of great food.

We hope that you and yours have a safe, restful and fulfilling
Thanksgiving. I am grateful for you and for everyone I’ve had the chance
to work with this year, for everyone who has volunteered for or supported
our work, for everyone doing all that they can for this great country at
its moment of truth.

Happy Thanksgiving,

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191126footer&t=1001&refcode2=69404_444211_hqSzwW&akid=69404%2E444211%2EhqSzwW

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=69404%2E444211%2EhqSzwW

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

Friend - If you know anything about my father, you know that keeping the "status quo" is simply not in his DNA. He is a disruptive game changer and a leader in every sense of the word.

While many elected leaders in Washington scurried away to the protective shelter of the swamp, **Senator Steve Daines was not one of them.**

**_He truly has been one of the most ardent and stalwart supporters of my father from Day 1_.**
[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=591b8370afd64fa78fe96e3ec1500a01&_e=yLD6E5xT_20MxuAGdRtKaKaGtQXBorNdsIZMLjWATXGRMIAe5hR-EJcX-OaCS_sTtPUpQdcjBrG-QV__z-5rKRbrHtoc6e7uh7Af9NXUPLyXKu-lcrNYdE0LqTDLjRiHi4-3ybIbIINSPPKwWAK1As818Q_-sxq7EpPgqSLvO3ZJgxZhWi3JUqr29qpVoqkNXlC4U7aNma2RQprdAOnKnT6Oqv45NWj1yU9blVHIDqMkXZE_5S6wli3Cgg_abHxN6PXEM3W7r9h1Polr1ZLPGRnLsyAyiY-uv8G7dFFD9xbwrWlF_8d8W6yoB0I-jbtrJYu4BAz9-e7RnZCfouHQLvXlWMIJ2cAXESHAynxYaOte0ID9TAs1jQIFGl_2UTty)
This support has helped to make the first 2 plus years of my father's Presidency one of THE MOST productive in the history of our country. Our economy is booming, joblessness is near historic lows, our enemies have been defeated, our country is respected around the globe once again and he truly has made America great again.

And let me make this clear, my father simply could not have achieved this kind of success without leaders like Senator Steve Daines standing in his corner and voting to implement his staunch conservative reforms.

2020 promises to be the hardest fought election in the history of our nation. The Democrats HATE my father and HATE his conservative agenda. They will do ANYTHING to stop all those who fight to make America great again, and that includes defeating anyone brave enough to stand with him. That puts my friend Senator Daines squarely in the crosshairs of the Democratic Political Machine.

**[Friend, that's why I am emailing you today to ask for you to join me in supporting Senator Steve Daines in what could shape up to be one of the biggest Senate races in 2020.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=591b8370afd64fa78fe96e3ec1500a01&_e=yLD6E5xT_20MxuAGdRtKaKaGtQXBorNdsIZMLjWATXGRMIAe5hR-EJcX-OaCS_sTtPUpQdcjBrG-QV__z-5rKRbrHtoc6e7uh7Af9NXUPLyXKu-lcrNYdE0LqTDLjRiHi4-3ybIbIINSPPKwWAK1As818Q_-sxq7EpPgqSLvO3Yb4Q9qSPmXyJ-DoT--lBMOXtQH3ukWx16GnJO6UdSXiHh2q9J5mzxqjdy3UYhzpV_eN3jUD7yd2ML4nQ3VVDuhCv2B4cEieCvavfrqPddQTlMIrSxfDqbTVVN-z9EBnWmZnukBBll4f5tfEsBC57WqZ4PLYdE7I2cCpOF0XrGAF0bPnjLlLOEFHhRrXu3i0-ThvnsaFu9eYJYmwBTVfFDA) **

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump is abandoning the U.S. to climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump has made it clear throughout his campaign and presidency that he thinks climate change is a hoax and efforts to combat it are hurting businesses. Now, he's taken the bold, reckless, and dangerous step of withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris Agreement, the most comprehensive international treaty combating climate change. With this, he's all but guaranteed that the U.S. will continue polluting at unprecedented levels, dooming us and future generations to a planet wracked by extreme weather and mass extinction due to drastic changes in the environment. [**But we can fight back. We can stand up to the president and tell him we want to be a part of the Paris Agreement and combat the severe damage we 're doing to our own planet. If you agree, please add your name today to demand we remain in the Paris Agreement!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcff/6e9863e8/16a67b42/1db0a660/3571560705/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/parisclimate/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing up for the planet and future generations. name: Mark Warner
subject: My to-do list for the week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
There's quite a bit to get done before November ends, but if I can check all of these things off my list, I think we'll be in a good place heading into Thanksgiving and the end of the year.
|
---
| | | **Trump is investing in VA.
_But so are we._

[Chip in before the end of November](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d79c/53d9897e/53fe26d7/1c89ea17/3448114530/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-list?refcode=20191126nd__364__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
---
Derek,

I thought I'd share my to-do list for the week with you. There's quite a bit to get done before November ends, but **if I can check all of these things off my list, I think we'll be in a good place heading into Thanksgiving and the end of the year.**
| ☐ | Hire new campaign staff
---|---|---
| ☐ | Go to annual Thanksgiving pick-up basketball game
| ☐ | Grab last-minute groceries for Thanksgiving dinner
| ☐ | Raise $10,000 by the end of the month
**Now, most of these are on me to get done, but frankly I need your help on the last one. Everyone on my team is about to head home for Thanksgiving, but I just got word we're still short of our November goal.[Can I count on you to help me reach my end-of-month fundraising goal of $10,000?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d79c/53d9897e/53fe26d7/1c89ea16/3448114530/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-list?refcode=20191126nd__364__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

By now, you already know Donald Trump and national Republicans have their eye on Virginia in 2020. They've already begun investing heavily in our Commonwealth, but so are we. They're spending so much time and money here because **they know the path to a Democratic White House and Senate runs right through Virginia.**

We need to begin building a grassroots movement across the entire Commonwealth to halt national Republicans' attempts to flip Virginia in 2020 **_and_** protect our brand-new gains in the General Assembly.

**[Any donation you make right now toward our November goal will go a long way toward helping me keep Virginia blue (plus it'll let me check another item off my to-do list)!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d79c/53d9897e/53fe26d7/1c89ea15/3448114530/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-list?refcode=20191126nd__364__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support,
Mark

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d79c/53d9897e/53fe26d7/1c89ea14/3448114530/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-list?refcode=20191126nd__364__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d79c/53d9897e/53fe26d7/1c89ea13/3448114530/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Michael (personal)
subject: against all odds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

As a Senator from Colorado -- a purple state -- I've never known an easy election.

Only 3% of Coloradans knew me when I started my first Senate campaign.

Against impossible odds, I went on to beat a Tea Party Republican in a terrible year for Democrats.

Six years later, I did it again.

The pundits considered us a long shot then -- and some are saying the same thing now.

[We proved them wrong before, and we'll do it again.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba992/134673f2/9ce33f3/6997a4eb/3992638683/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_112619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Right now we're facing a crucial deadline - raising $100,000 by midnight Saturday. I know it won't be easy - but neither were my two victories in Colorado.

[So I'm asking, team, will you step up now and rush a donation today? Any amount you can give -- $3, $5, or even $29 -- will get us closer to achieving our goal to raise another $100,000 ahead of our deadlines >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba992/134673f2/9ce33f3/6997a4eb/3992638683/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_112619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Rolling up our sleeves and doing the work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moulton Leadership Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Moulton for Congress, Seth Moulton for America, Inc
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12263473/125925211/-1369401587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWZhMzc1NC1hYjEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ECfkNEG9Hx6yHUjAcd_Vk86nPND0YQ5ciKR5WgImfg=&emci=1e7dad5c-9210-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=75fa3754-ab10-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=194769) Friend, When President Trump was elected, I decided Democrats needed a few more allies in Congress. So I started Serve America with a two-fold mission:
* To flip the House because that’s the best way to put a check on Trump
* To change Congress by electing better leaders to office

We tried to find people who would make a difference, and Democrats flipped 40 seats to take back the House in 2018. Almost half of them were Serve America candidates. So the question is: “Are these people making a difference?” **Well, every single one of the national security leaders that signed the[ _Washington Post_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12263474/125925212/1503404972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWZhMzc1NC1hYjEwLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ECfkNEG9Hx6yHUjAcd_Vk86nPND0YQ5ciKR5WgImfg=&emci=1e7dad5c-9210-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=75fa3754-ab10-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=194769) op-ed that was the tipping point for Democratic leadership to start the impeachment inquiry was a Serve America-supported candidate. ** The answer is crystal clear: These leaders _**are**_ making a difference. So I’m grateful for all those who came out on Wednesday night, and I’m grateful to all of you for the work you’ve done to support Serve America in 2018 and in 2020. Ultimately, for Democrats, 2020 is an opportunity to take back foreign policy for our party. It’s our opportunity to lead on issues that Trump and the Republicans have failed on the most. And it’s an opportunity to show, as a party, what leadership is all about. Thank you for all you’ve done and will continue to do to get incredible leaders elected. -Seth Friend,I’ve got to tell you... When a Democrat won this Texas conservative congressional district in 2018, I hoped it was just a fluke._But sadly, a report just came out showing that our race is rated a TOSS-UP once again in 2020._ The Democrat won in 2018 because she had the cash advantage. And their fundraising is showing no sign of slowing down at all._Meanwhile, we’re still short of our November goal by $9,274._[**Please make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to help us clean_body: This race shouldn’t be a toss-up... Friend,I’ve got to tell you... When a Democrat won this Texas conservative congressional district in 2018, I hoped it was just a fluke.But sadly, a report just came out showing that our race is rated a TOSS-UP once again in 2020. The Democrat won in 2018 because she had the cash advantage. And their fundraising is showing no sign of slowing down at all.Meanwhile, we’re still short of our November goal by $9,274. After Nancy Pelosi bought this district in 2018, we knew we’d have to fight twice as hard to keep Texas red in 2020.The Lone Star State is no place for the radical Left’s socialist agenda, Friend.And I will fight tooth and nail in Congress — just like I did in the Army — to ensure our conservative values are defended. But I need the help of grassroots patriots like you to get there. Thank you, Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Republican Candidate for Congress| 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056| Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2800 for the primary election, $2,800 for the primary run-off election, and $2,800 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Why I fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/T8hu89Mxp9JNhjPWoUqzLvdiXf1_mBfUgxUj46UuFcg=/px0mhJsW-eG6tYx_-3GXL-6UBjKAaSMJA2Bc8ze29vQ=?recurring=auto&amount=25&refcode=1126-EOM)
---
Folks, The America I grew up in was not always a welcoming place for people like me. I was eight years old when Rosa Parks refused to give up her seat on a public bus, a righteous act of civil disobedience that kicked off a movement unlike any we had seen before. Over the next decade and a half, thousands of Americans risked everything to stand up to injustice, speak truth to power, and uphold the principles of equality and democracy this nation was founded on. When times were tough, it was the strength of those moral leaders that carried me through -- to law school, to the NAACP, and eventually, to Congress. I have fought my entire life to continue the work that those brave men and women started, and to achieve the just and prosperous America that they envisioned. We have made enormous strides since the Civil Rights movement -- and now have taken some frightening steps backward. President Donald Trump wants to "Make America Great Again" \-- but I knew that America, and it was not great for all of us. **I will always fight to move _forward_ , toward an America that works for ALL people. But I can't do it alone.** **President Donald Trump and those who want to bring us back in time have been attacking me relentlessly for months, and they show no signs of slowing down.[Will you stand with me by contributing to my re-election campaign today, so that I can keep fighting for a better America for ALL of us?](https://act.myngp.com/el/T8hu89Mxp9JNhjPWoUqzLvdiXf1_mBfUgxUj46UuFcg=/px0mhJsW-eG6tYx_-3GXL-6UBjKAaSMJA2Bc8ze29vQ=?recurring=auto&amount=25&refcode=1126-EOM)** Thank you, team. Your support means the world to me. In solidarity, Congressman Al Green | **[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/T8hu89Mxp9JNhjPWoUqzLvdiXf1_mBfUgxUj46UuFcg=/px0mhJsW-eG6tYx_-3GXL-6UBjKAaSMJA2Bc8ze29vQ=?recurring=auto&amount=25&refcode=1126-EOM)**
---

Houston TX 77256-6761 United States | Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

subject: "Mini-Trump"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tina is busy doing her job in the Senate and on the campaign trail talking with voters -- leaving her with very little time to fundraise for our campaign. So, we're turning to you.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191126-mini?refcode=em191126-mini&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Folks, we'll get straight to it: Jason Lewis, Tina's opponent and Trump's hand-picked Republican candidate, is not who Minnesotans want representing them in the U.S. Senate. Full stop.

So, we're doubling up on our resources to win this election -- especially now that we know Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their special-interest allies are focused on our race. It's only a matter of time before a truckload of dark money will flood into Minnesota to attack Tina. And here's the thing...

Tina is spending a lot of her time doing her job in the Senate and on the campaign trail talking with voters. As you can imagine, that leaves her with very little time to fundraise for our campaign. So, we're turning to you:

**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to support our campaign before the end-of-month deadline on Saturday? name: Team Franken
subject: we want your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Time: The Democratic Party Is Making Early Endorsements in Senate Primaries. Grassroots Activists Aren't Happy
|
---
| |
---

| | **_Time_ : The Democratic Party Is Making Early Endorsements in Senate Primaries. Grassroots Activists Aren't Happy **_-11/25/2019_
[**Make YOUR endorsement by chipping in to Mike Franken 's grassroots campaign >>**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2427/33365068/4a63f2e2/3f8b8b30/904132637/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191126_em_fr_tf_b1_all&amount=15") Here's what Mike had to say about DC meddling: "_We shouldn 't rig elections... generally speaking the operatives in Washington, DC, do not have a track history in this state of choosing the most viable candidate._" We wholeheartedly agree. Mike is the leader Iowa deserves. As a vice admiral, he learned the responsibility that comes with an office of such high station and that's why he voted against the Iraq invasion plans in the Pentagon, risking his career. As a candidate, he led the field in supporting the impeachment proceedings because it was the right thing to do. **And as your next senator, he will continue to take bold, decisive action on behalf of every Iowan, just like he 's always done.** **[But we need to keep up our grassroots momentum. Chip in here and help Mike make it to the Senate>> ](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2427/33365068/4a63f2e2/3f8b8b30/904132637/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191126_em_fr_tf_b1_all&amount=15")** | [CHIP IN >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2427/33365068/4a63f2e2/3f8b8b31/904132637/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=20191126_em_fr_tf_b1_all&amount=15")

name: Warren for President
subject: We have just four days

We have just four days until our next fundraising deadline, **and the only chance we have at hitting this important November goal is with your help.**

Because here's the thing about how we raise money for this campaign: even though it's an important goal to hit, Elizabeth isn't spending her time calling a list of wealthy donors to help. If we fall short, she's not going to ask her team to pencil in a ticketed fundraising event next week to make up the difference.

**We fund this campaign by asking supporters like you to chip in whatever they can, whenever they can -- not by courting a few people who can afford to write a big check.**

**[We 've had a slow start to the week and that means we need your help more than ever before. Please chip in $2 or anything you can today to help hit this November fundraising goal before the deadline.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b467/45c30650/11989094a/66f6bdfa/2660580087/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFZRl9FT01fR1JNX1BfMjAxOTExMjZfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1YF_EOM_GRM_P_20191126_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
What this team does in the next four days will help determine our budget in the critical months ahead.

This is a pivotal time in this race, and we need to continue to ramp up our efforts on all fronts to prepare for the Iowa caucuses and voting in early states -- that can only happen if we hit this goal.

Without the backing of Super PACs or federal lobbyists, Elizabeth truly needs your help right now to build this grassroots movement for big, structural change.

**[Can you chip in $2 right now to ensure we hit this important goal and have a strong budget in the critical weeks ahead?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b467/45c30650/11989094a/66f6bdfa/2660580087/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFZRl9FT01fR1JNX1BfMjAxOTExMjZfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1YF_EOM_GRM_P_20191126_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for all that you do,

Team Warren

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Devin Nunes has other plans for the impeachment inquiry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Devin Nunes, the ranking GOP member on the House Intelligence Committee, is on the warpath to derail the impeachment inquiry: He tried to force the identity of the whistleblower out of Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman during his questioning, disregarding the fact that whistleblowers are protected under federal law and Trump is causing an ongoing threat to their safety, labelling them a spy and suggesting the death penalty. He's pushed debunked conspiracy theories that come right out of the Kremlin. He compared the investigation to a cult twice and accused congressional Democrats of trying to obtain nude photos of the president. When Congress reconvenes to debate impeachment, we know Devin Nunes will lead the charge to distract and mislead the American people, so we need to hear what voters like you think NOW: **Do you approve of Devin Nunes?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce1/6e9863e8/16a39521/1db0a163/3950618270/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-djXBm2Z") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce1/6e9863e8/16a39521/1db0a163/3950618270/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/-djXBm2Z") Thank you in advance for your feedback \-- we couldn't do this work without you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce1/6e9863e8/16a39521/1db0a162/3950618270/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191126c.ND-b&refcode2=4X3GUjAfSTKwuUY8jekW")
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Will you be my guest?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
It wouldn’t be a party without you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6aee3f85b556/will-you-be-my-guest?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | **On Friday, December 13 th at 6 pm, I am hosting a Christmas Party at my campaign office...and you’re invited!**

Please join me, my family, and our campaign staff for a celebration of the holiday season.

Come in your festive holiday attire for an evening with fellow conservatives from across Fort Bend, Brazoria, and Harris counties!
**Bring a toy to donate to Toys for Tots Fort Bend County to bring Christmas joy to children in our community this holiday season.**
---
|
---
| Together, we will fight to prevent the local and national Democrats from turning Congressional District 22 into another New York or California...and we’ll do a little to help some kids in our community while we’re at it.

Learn more about my campaign, get involved, and share a fun evening with like-minded patriots from across the area.
[**Please RSVP**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=cb46b5891f&e=01c99b7fbd)[**by December 11 if you are able to join us**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=20efd7e9f6&e=01c99b7fbd)
**When:**
Friday, December 13th from 6:00 - 7:30 pm

**Where:**
Kathaleen Wall for Congress Campaign Office
8410 Highway 90 A, Ste 160 in Sugar Land

I look forward to seeing you there!

Kathaleen

subject: crises we must face
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |

| | Our campaign is critical to making sure the biggest issues facing Americans are addressed. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e0/3eb3e2fc/57b8e35c/744d507f/1918043886/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191126_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191126_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. subject: BREAKING: President Trump pardons ‘Butter’ as the 2019 National Thanksgiving Turkey
body:
This afternoon, President Donald J. Trump continued a cherished White House holiday tradition by officially pardoning... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=409efdf0af&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 26, 2019
---
| | |
# **BREAKING: President Trump pardons ‘Butter’ as the 2019 National Thanksgiving Turkey**

**This afternoon,** President Donald J. Trump continued a cherished White House holiday tradition by officially pardoning the National Thanksgiving Turkey.

**“Bread” and “Butter,”** two birds from North Carolina, were the feathered contestants vying for this year’s honor. In perhaps the closest turkey pardon contest in White House history, Butter won over Americans’ hearts by a slim margin—taking 50.3% of the vote.

[Watch: President Trump pardons the National Thanksgiving Turkey!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=041db98714&e=3ee4985eea)

**Speaking from the Rose Garden** , President Trump decided to extend a pardon to both lucky birds. He also wished all Americans a happy, peaceful Thanksgiving.

**After a hard-fought race,** both turkeys have earned some quality rest and relaxation time. Following today’s Rose Garden ceremony, they are now headed to their new home at “Gobblers Rest” on the Virginia Tech campus. They will be cared for by veterinarians and students at the school’s exhibit, where they can be visited by the public.

[Learn more about the famous White House turkey pardon tradition.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9387a40fb8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: First Lady receives 2019 White House Christmas Tree**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d2cfa92b0c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Christmas came early** in Washington yesterday, as First Lady Melania Trump kicked off this season’s festivities by receiving the official White House Christmas tree.

**Arriving by horse-drawn carriage** near the front steps of the White House, the more than 5-meter-tall Douglas Fir will stand tall in the Blue Room, where it will serve as the centerpiece for the White House’s Christmas decorations this December.

**Since 1966,** the National Christmas Tree Association has held an annual contest to select the official White House Christmas tree. This year’s selection was cut from Mahantongo Valley Farms in Pennsylvania, and owner Larry Snyder had the honor of presenting it for the arrival.
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
| **President Donald J. Trump pardons Butter in the Rose Garden of the White House** | November 26, 2019
---

| | Offshore drilling is a major threat to Massachusetts and all of coastal America: we've seen its consequences in the devastated marine ecosystems and wildlife habitats up and down our shores; in the crude-covered beaches and polluted waterways; in the struggling small businesses and collapsing tourism economies. **Yet Donald Trump is clamoring to auction off even more of our shorelines to Big Oil.** [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390945/55b66746/2caefb1b/80f1c69/3976947551/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/kennedy/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-11-atlantic-offshore-drilling-email") **Coastal communities already struggling with the consequences of global climate change stand to suffer the most.** Trump's plan to escalate drilling operations would risk the calamity of an oil spill and subject communities to more pipelines and refineries, the ordeal of seismic testing, and increased traffic and pollution. **Trump built a significant share of his business on the exploitation of poor communities.** His frantic effort to sell our shorelines to Big Oil reeks of the very same dangerous greed. And thousands, if not millions, of people stand to suffer the consequences. It's up to us to stop them before the drilling starts. [**Stand with me as we take the fight to them. Join the movement. Sign the petition and tell them NO WAY to any more offshore oil drilling.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390945/55b66746/2caefb1b/80f1c69/3976947551/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/kennedy/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-11-atlantic-offshore-drilling-email") [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390945/55b66746/2caefb1b/80f1c69/3976947551/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/kennedy/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-11-atlantic-offshore-drilling-email") |

Here’s the bottom line — you shouldn’t be opening political fundraising emails or even looking at your email inbox on Thanksgiving.

name: Sara 2020
subject: November has been a very difficult month for fundraising. We simply need to turn this around, and we have a plan to do it.
body:
It's a problem.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f64/4bef7a87/6bbbddaa/287ffc0c/934349314/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Here's the truth --
November has been a very difficult month for fundraising. We've raised significantly less this month than we did in October, and that's a problem.
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f64/4bef7a87/6bbbddaa/287ffc03/934349314/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191126-2-full")
**We simply need to turn this around. That 's why we've set a goal of raising $150,000 before the end of November.**
**[Can Sara count on you to make your first online contribution before our end-of-month deadline? This really is important.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f64/4bef7a87/6bbbddaa/287ffc03/934349314/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191126-2-full")**
Together, we are proving that we have what it takes to defeat Susan Collins and flip the U.S. Senate for Democrats. Thanks for being a part of that.
\- Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f64/4bef7a87/6bbbddaa/287ffc03/934349314/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191126-2-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f64/4bef7a87/6bbbddaa/287ffc02/934349314/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f64/4bef7a87/6bbbddaa/287ffc01/934349314/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Last Week With Rob
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
** LAST WEEK WITH ROB
------------------------------------------------------------
Hello Friends,

Each week, I’ll be bringing you a short recap on where I’ve been and what I’ve been doing across New York’s 27^th Congressional District. I’ll be discussing the issues I hear from you and residents across Western New York and I’ll be introducing you to the residents who make our community and our country so great.

** Livingston County
------------------------------------------------------------
Last week, I spent time in Livingston County and hosted a “meet and greet” with residents at The Village Tavern in Geneseo. I don’t rely on focus groups, polls, or the media to tell me what people care about. I prefer a handshake, looking someone in the eyes, and having a conversation. I host events like these to hear the thoughts and concerns directly from the people.

** Geneseo Young Republicans
------------------------------------------------------------

In Geneseo, I had the opportunity to meet with members of SUNY Geneseo’s Young Republican Club. These groups provide an important alternative to the radical and extreme liberal groups and professors that shut down anything that resembles an opposing view. We had some great discussions about government and the political landscape and I’m excited about these individuals serving as future leaders in our community and our country.

** East Avon VFD Turkey Raffle
------------------------------------------------------------

On Saturday night, I joined Chief Jeff Faugh and the East Avon Volunteer Fire Department for their annual Turkey Raffle. Each year, this raffle brings out a huge crowd of individuals wishing to support their local fire department. I want to thank the East Avon VFD for inviting me to join them this year and want to thank all the great people I met for making me feel welcome and for protecting our communities.

** Letter to U.S. AG Barr
------------------------------------------------------------
Finally, I’d like to share an update on an issue that I believe is critically important for our state – I recently called on U.S. Attorney General William Barr to open an investigation into Gov. Cuomo. This was prompted by disturbing allegations that the New York State Joint Commission on Public Ethics (JCOPE) may have illegally disclosed details of its deliberations of Governor Cuomo’s top aide (who is now imprisoned on a corruption conviction) to Governor Andrew Cuomo and that Cuomo may have then tried to influence the commission. This is a disturbing allegation as JCOPE is specifically designed to be an independent oversight body tasked with rooting out corruption in a state notorious for its ethical embarrassments.
As always, feel free to stay up to date on my campaign by following me on facebook and twitter at @RobOrttforCongress and let me know what’s going on in your community and your life. Thank you and God Bless.

Rob
Battle-tested Patriot

Donate Here (https://secure.winred.com/ortt-for-congress/donate)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n3f8XFD4HJ8#action=share
Missed your campaign launch video? Click here to learn more about my campaign to bring conservative, battle-tested leadership to Washington.

============================================================
** https://www.facebook.com/OrttforCongress/ (https://www.facebook.com/OrttforCongress/)
** Twitter (https://twitter.com/orttforcongress)
** www.robortt.com (www.robortt.com)
** info@robortt.com (mailto:info@robortt.com)
Rob Ortt for Congress
PO Box 101
Lockport, NY 14094

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=11de919d8c&e=9f843ba602&c=6610785a55)
.

East Avon VFD Turkey Raffle On Saturday night, I joined Chief Jeff Faugh and the East Avon Volunteer Fire Department for their annual Turkey Raffle. Each year, this raffle brings out a huge crowd of individuals wishing to support their local fire department. I want to thank the East Avon VFD for inviting me to join them this year and want to thank all the great people I met for making me feel welcome and for protecting our communities. Letter to U.S. AG Barr Finally, I’d like to share an update on an issue that I believe is critically important for our state – I recently called on U.S. Attorney General William Barr to open an investigation into Gov. Cuomo. This was prompted by disturbing allegations that the New York State Joint Commission on Public Ethics (JCOPE) may have illegally disclosed details of its deliberations of Governor Cuomo’s top aide (who is now imprisoned on a corruption conviction) to Governor Andrew Cuomo and that Cuomo may have then tried to influence the commission. This is a disturbing allegation as JCOPE is specifically designed to be an independent oversight body tasked with rooting out corruption in a state notorious for its ethical embarrassments.
